The workspace is effectively empty aside from a placeholder README, so I’m using a discovery pass to identify the cleanest app structure and the main technical decisions that need your input.

{
  "kind": "toolInvocationSerialized",
  "invocationMessage": "Discover app structure",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "isComplete": true,
  "source": {
    "type": "internal",
    "label": "Built-In"
  },
  "toolSpecificData": {
    "kind": "subagent",
    "description": "Discover app structure",
    "agentName": "Explore",
    "prompt": "Quick discovery for planning only. The workspace is essentially empty except for a placeholder README. The user wants a web app to simulate bullet-hit localization on a target using 3 acoustic sensors, with future configurability for sensor positions and possibly 4 sensors. Recommend a pragmatic architecture for an MVP deployable on Netlify, note whether a pure static frontend or Node-backed app is more appropriate, identify the main technical modules/features the plan should include, and list the most important clarifying questions to ask the user. Desired thoroughness: medium. Do not write code.",
    "modelName": "Claude Haiku 4.5",
    "result": "# Bullet Localization Web App - Discovery Notes\n\n## Recommended Architecture: Hybrid Static + Serverless\n\n**Pure Static Frontend** would be more practical for MVP on Netlify, but consider **Netlify Functions** as your scaling path:\n\n- **Tier 1 (MVP)**: React/Vue SPA with all localization math in JavaScript frontend\n  - ✓ Zero backend needed, instant deployment\n  - ✓ Customers can download/self-host easily\n  - ✓ Works offline\n  - ✗ Harder to maintain complex algorithms\n\n- **Tier 2 (Scaling)**: Add Netlify Functions (lightweight Node.js) for:\n  - Offload heavy computations (simulations, batch processing)\n  - Store/retrieve sensor configurations\n  - Generate reports/exports\n  - No cold-start penalty on Netlify\n\n**Verdict**: Start with pure static, architecture your code so backend calls are optional.\n\n---\n\n## Core Technical Modules\n\n1. **Sensor Configuration Management**\n   - UI to define 3 (or 4+) sensor positions (x, y, z if 3D)\n   - Sensor specs: sensitivity, max range, noise characteristics\n   - Persistence: localStorage or config file import/export\n\n2. **Acoustic Physics Engine**\n   - TDOA (time-difference-of-arrival) solver → most practical for real bullets\n   - Trilateration/multilateration algorithm\n   - Input: arrival time differences between sensors\n   - Output: 2D/3D impact coordinates\n\n3. **Simulation & Visualization**\n   - Target diagram with sensor positions\n   - Real-time animation of bullet impact + calculated position\n   - Confidence bounds/error ellipse\n   - Heatmap of historical impacts\n\n4. **Data Input & Testing**\n   - Manual input: arrival times per sensor\n   - Demo mode: generate synthetic bullet patterns\n   - Import CSV/JSON test datasets\n   - Monte Carlo error simulation (noisy data)\n\n5. **Results & Reporting**\n   - Accuracy metrics (actual vs. calculated)\n   - Export impact coordinates\n   - Configurable report templates\n\n---\n\n## Architecture Sketch\n\n```\n┌─ Frontend (React/Vue/Svelte)\n│  ├─ Sensor Configuration Panel\n│  ├─ Visualization (canvas/D3/Plotly)\n│  ├─ Input Forms (manual times or CSV upload)\n│  └─ Results Display + Export\n│\n├─ Business Logic (TypeScript/JS, reusable)\n│  ├─ TDOA solver\n│  ├─ Trilateration algorithm\n│  ├─ Confidence interval calculator\n│  └─ Config schema validator\n│\n└─ [Optional] Netlify Functions (scale later)\n   ├─ Batch simulation runner\n   ├─ Config persistence (KV storage)\n   └─ Report generator\n```\n\n---\n\n## Most Important Clarifying Questions\n\n1. **TDOA vs. TOA**: Do you have time-differences between sensors arrival, or absolute arrival times? (TDOA is standard for ballistics; TOA requires synchronized clocks)\n\n2. **2D vs. 3D**: Is this targeting on a flat range (2D) or can bullets hit anywhere in 3D space? (Affects sensor placement complexity)\n\n3. **Accuracy targets**: What localization error is acceptable? (Drives sensor selection & algorithm choice)\n\n4. **Data source**: \n   - Will real sensor data feed in live?\n   - Or is this a training/simulation tool for shooters/instructors?\n   - Or a product to sell customers?\n\n5. **Sensor specs to parameterize**:\n   - Just positions, or also frequency response, calibration curves, time sync tolerance?\n   - Do you have realistic sensor specs to model?\n\n6. **Configurability scope**: \n   - Is \"sensor position config\" the main user need, or do they also tune algorithms/thresholds?\n   - Will operators change sensor layout physically between uses?\n\n7. **Multi-user/sharing**: Does each user get a saved configuration, or is this single-operator?\n\n8. **Browser/platform**: Desktop only, or mobile-friendly for range-side tablets?\n\n---\n\n**Next Step**: Answer Q1 (TDOA vs. TOA) and Q4 (real data vs. simulation) to nail down the MVP scope."
  },
  "toolCallId": "call_v03r9affkL5NkdWLZ3PPnwPI",
  "toolId": "runSubagent"
}

          "id": "2D target plane only",
          "label": "2D target plane only - Assume sensors are projected onto the target plane",

          "id": "Full 3D model",
          "label": "Full 3D model - Model sensor positions in 3D space",

It's probably good to note that no backend is needed for the MVP. I should also ensure to verify the architecture and consider asking about the UI framework.

**Clarifying the simulation plan**

It seems I should consider recommending a plan, but first, I might need to clarify with the user whether they want precise ballistics realism or something more educational. The simulation might later incorporate real sensor data. I should note that the plan currently assumes a constant speed of sound, ignoring future changes in temperature or humidity. This could be an important ambiguity, so I think I’ll ask a concise question about whether environmental effects matter in their model.

The new input pushes the MVP toward an educational simulator with visible error behavior, so I’m doing one more targeted discovery pass on solver structure and how to leave room for a 4th sensor without overbuilding the first release.

{
  "kind": "toolInvocationSerialized",
  "invocationMessage": "Research solver design",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "isComplete": true,
  "source": {
    "type": "internal",
    "label": "Built-In"
  },
  "toolSpecificData": {
    "kind": "subagent",
    "description": "Research solver design",
    "agentName": "Explore",
    "prompt": "Planning-only discovery for a bullet impact localization simulator. User wants: simulation first, future real sensor input, 2D target plane with configurable sensor depth behind target, 3 sensors now with optional 4th later, detailed visible calculations, rectangular target customization, and advanced first-pass physics/error modeling. Recommend the solver/data-model architecture for an MVP that starts with 3 sensors but can compare against an optional 4th later. Cover: whether to separate deterministic geometry from noisy timing simulation, what outputs to show in UI, and what validations or limitations should be explicit in the plan. Desired thoroughness: medium. Do not write code.",
    "modelName": "Claude Haiku 4.5",
    "result": "I'll provide a planning-only architectural recommendation for your bullet impact localization simulator. Let me structure this around the core decisions you need to make.\n\n## Recommended MVP Architecture\n\n### 1. **Two-Layer Simulation Model**\n\nSeparate these explicitly from the start:\n\n- **Deterministic Geometry Layer**: Pure ray-tracing/triangulation that computes impact locations given perfect sensor readings. This is your ground truth.\n- **Noisy Timing Simulation Layer**: Wraps the geometry layer, adds configurable timing errors (sensor noise, propagation variance, clock drift) to create realistic inputs.\n\n**Rationale**: This separation lets you validate solver correctness against known impacts, then layer noise independently. You can swap simulated sensors for real ones later.\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Data Model Structure**\n\n```\nCore Entities:\n├── SensorArray\n│   ├── sensors: Sensor[3..4]  (configurable count, 2D positions)\n│   └── depth: float            (behind target plane)\n├── Target (2D)\n│   ├── width, height\n│   ├── position (origin reference)\n│   └── normal (always facing sensors)\n├── ImpactEvent\n│   ├── impact_position: (x, y) on target\n│   ├── true_timestamp: float\n│   └── sensor_arrivals: TimingMeasurement[]\n├── NoiseProfile\n│   ├── timing_jitter_std: float\n│   ├── clock_drift: float\n│   ├── speed_of_sound_variation: float\n│   └── bias_per_sensor: float[]\n└── SolverResult\n    ├── estimated_position: (x, y)\n    ├── confidence/residual\n    ├── sensor_subset_used: int[]\n    └── calculation_trace (for UI)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Solver Architecture (MVP)**\n\n**Primary Approach: Triangulation via Time Difference of Arrival (TDOA)**\n\nFor 3 sensors: 2 TDOA pairs → 2 hyperbola intersections → unique solution (overdetermined with noise)\n\nFor 4 sensors: 3 TDOA pairs → overdetermined system → use least-squares to find best fit\n\n**Implementation strategy**:\n- **Deterministic solver**: Algebraic (hyperbola intersection) or iterative (minimize timing residuals)\n- **Validation capability**: Compare 3-sensor solution vs. 4-sensor solution (4th as optional ground truth)\n- **Robustness**: Handle degenerate cases (colinear sensors, shallow geometry angles)\n\n**Why not direct distance?** You're measuring *time*, not distance. Avoid converting to distance early—work in time domain, derive positions.\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Key Field Decisions**\n\n| Field | Purpose | Rationale |\n|-------|---------|-----------|\n| `speed_of_sound` (configurable) | Converts timing → distance | Realistic: ~343 m/s air, but simulation lets you tune for water/materials |\n| `sensor_depth` (behind target) | Geometry of tri-measurement | Critical for triangulation accuracy; different from target plane |\n| `timestamp_resolution` | Measurement precision | E.g., microseconds; drives noise floor |\n| `noise_profile` (per-sensor, per-impact) | Realistic variability | Jitter + bias + drift; enables validation of filter robustness |\n\n---\n\n### 5. **UI Output Strategy**\n\nShow these in real-time during simulation/validation:\n\n1. **Target visualization**\n   - 2D rectangle with impact point marked\n   - Grid overlay (for custom sizing)\n\n2. **Sensor configuration**\n   - 3D side view: sensors behind target plane, depth labeled\n   - Detection radii (optional; audio propagation cones)\n\n3. **Calculation trace** (the \"detailed visible calculations\")\n   - Raw timing measurements (with noise envelope)\n   - Hyperbola curves for each TDOA pair\n   - Intersection point(s)\n   - Residual error per sensor\n   - Solver iteration steps (if iterative)\n\n4. **Comparison view** (3 vs. 4 sensor modes)\n   - Overlay both solutions\n   - Confidence bounds\n   - Which sensor contributed most/least to solution\n\n5. **Statistics panel**\n   - Error distribution across runs\n   - Confidence intervals\n   - Failure/degenerate case flags\n\n---\n\n### 6. **Deterministic vs. Noisy: Recommended Split**\n\n| Component | Deterministic | Noisy | Location |\n|-----------|---------------|-------|----------|\n| Impact → sensor timing | ✓ | (add noise here) | `GeometryModel` |\n| Noise injection | | ✓ | `NoiseModel` wrapper |\n| Solver (TDOA) | ✓ | (works on noisy inputs) | `Solver` |\n| Validation | ✓ (compare to ground truth) | ✓ (compare 3-vs-4 solutions) | `Validator` |\n\n**Pattern**: `noisy_measurements = inject_noise(deterministic_geometry.get_sensor_timings(impact))`\n\nThis lets you:\n- Test solver on perfect data (baseline)\n- Measure degradation with noise\n- Validate error bounds match noise profile\n\n---\n\n### 7. **Explicit Validations & Limitations**\n\nSet these in your plan upfront:\n\n**Validations to implement:**\n- ✓ Impact must be within target bounds\n- ✓ Sensor timing must obey causality (earliest arrival = closest sensor, generally)\n- ✓ Solver residual should be below noise floor for valid solutions\n- ✓ Hyperbola pairs must actually intersect (geometry sanity)\n- ✓ 4-sensor solution must improve on 3-sensor (if enabled)\n\n**Explicit limitations to document:**\n- ⚠ Assumes constant speed of sound (one global value, not spatial variation)\n- ⚠ Ignores target surface reflections/multipath (direct path only)\n- ⚠ Sensors assumed synchronized within tolerance (clock drift modeled, but not skew compensation)\n- ⚠ No air current/wind effects (straight-line propagation)\n- ⚠ Rectangular target only; no slant angle compensation yet\n- ⚠ Assumes bullet is acoustic point source (not extended shape)\n- ⚠ Solver works in 2D; vertical angle to sensors not resolved\n\n---\n\n### 8. **MVP Roadmap (Phases)**\n\n1. **Phase 1 (MVP Core)**\n   - Deterministic geometry: impact → 3 sensor timings\n   - TDOA solver (algebraic hyperbola)\n   - Basic noisy timing layer\n   - UI: target + impact + sensor positions + calculation trace\n\n2. **Phase 1.5 (Validation)**\n   - Comparison view: 3-sensor vs. 4-sensor overlay\n   - Error statistics\n   - Noise profile editor\n\n3. **Phase 2 (Advanced Physics)**\n   - Wind/air current effects\n   - Atmospheric variation (temperature → sound speed)\n   - Multipath reflections (if needed)\n\n4. **Phase 3 (Real Sensors)**\n   - Replace simulator with real device input\n   - Adaptive calibration per sensor\n   - Live noise profile learning\n\n---\n\n### 9. **Recommended First Implementation Order**\n\n1. Define `SensorArray`, `Target`, `ImpactEvent` classes\n2. Build deterministic geometry solver (impact → true timings)\n3. Build TDOA solver (timings → position estimate)\n4. Add `NoiseProfile` + injection\n5. Add UI trace output (calculations shown step-by-step)\n6. Build 4-sensor comparison logic\n7. Validation suite\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n**Key architectural choice**: Separate *computing true sensor data* (deterministic) from *corrupting it with noise* (probabilistic). The solver then runs on noisy data, giving you a realistic pipeline. \n\n**UI focus**: Show the calculation chain visibly—raw timings → hyperbola pairs → intersection. This builds confidence in the approach and helps debug later when real sensors differ.\n\n**For the optional 4th sensor**: Treat it as a validation tool in the MVP, not a fallback. If your 3-sensor solver is robust, the 4th should confirm it, not replace it.\n\nDoes this framing align with your vision, or would you like me to dive deeper on any specific aspect (e.g., TDOA math details, noise models, or UI interaction patterns)?"
  },
  "toolCallId": "call_LEWj7swlrOsHdJk3wIKozcKa",
  "toolId": "runSubagent"
}

## Plan: Bullet Impact Simulator MVP

Build the first version as a static TypeScript web app deployed on Netlify, with all simulation and localization math running in the browser. The recommended stack is `React + TypeScript + Vite`; that gives you a clean UI layer, easy Netlify deployment, and a straightforward path to optional `Netlify Functions` later if you ever need live sensor ingestion or batch processing. The core design choice is to keep three layers separate: deterministic geometry, noisy timing simulation, and the localization solver.

**Steps**
1. Scaffold the frontend app and define the shared data model for the target, sensors, noise profile, measurements, and solver output.
2. Implement the deterministic geometry engine that turns a clicked impact point into ideal arrival times for 3 sensors, using a 2D target plane plus configurable sensor depth behind it.
3. Add the advanced simulation layer that perturbs those ideal times with configurable jitter, bias, drift, and speed-of-sound variation.
4. Implement the 3-sensor TDOA solver so the app can reconstruct the impact point from the arrival-time data and return a visible calculation trace.
5. Build the main UI: clickable rectangular target, sensor markers, actual impact point, estimated impact point, and a side panel with per-sensor distances, timings, deltas, and final coordinates.
6. Add configuration controls for target size, sensor positions, sensor depth, and noise parameters, with validation for unstable or invalid layouts.
7. Add diagnostics: miss distance, residual/error reporting, and solver confidence so users can see not just the answer but how trustworthy it is.
8. Make the architecture 4-sensor-ready by shaping the config and solver interfaces now, without forcing full 4-sensor solving into the first release unless you want that expanded.
9. Add persistence for the last-used setup and presets for common layouts, then prepare the app for static Netlify deployment.
10. Verify with unit tests for geometry and solver correctness plus manual browser checks for clicking, resizing, reconfiguration, and invalid sensor setups.

**What’s included**
- Browser-based simulation first
- Rectangular target customization
- 3 sensors in v1
- Configurable sensor depth behind the target
- Detailed visible calculations per sensor
- Advanced configurable timing/error modeling
- Clean path to future real sensor input

**What’s deliberately deferred**
- Live hardware input
- Backend persistence or accounts
- Arbitrary polygon targets
- Multipath/reflection physics
- Full production-grade 4-sensor multilateration, unless you want to promote that into v1

**Recommendation**
Start with 3 sensors as the working solver, but design the solver API and config model so a 4th sensor can be added later for comparison or accuracy improvement without reworking the UI and data flow.

I’ve saved the detailed execution plan to session memory. If you want, I can now revise this plan in one of two directions:
1. Promote full 4-sensor solving into v1.
2. Keep v1 tighter and treat the 4th sensor purely as a later extension.

## Plan: Bullet Impact Simulator MVP

Build the first version as a static TypeScript web app deployed on Netlify, with all simulation and localization math running in the browser. The recommended stack is `React + TypeScript + Vite`; that gives you a clean UI layer, easy Netlify deployment, and a straightforward path to optional `Netlify Functions` later if you ever need live sensor ingestion or batch processing. The core design choice is to keep three layers separate: deterministic geometry, noisy timing simulation, and the localization solver.

**Steps**
1. Scaffold the frontend app and define the shared data model for the target, sensors, noise profile, measurements, and solver output.
2. Implement the deterministic geometry engine that turns a clicked impact point into ideal arrival times for 3 sensors, using a 2D target plane plus configurable sensor depth behind it.
3. Add the advanced simulation layer that perturbs those ideal times with configurable jitter, bias, drift, and speed-of-sound variation.
4. Implement the 3-sensor TDOA solver so the app can reconstruct the impact point from the arrival-time data and return a visible calculation trace.
5. Build the main UI: clickable rectangular target, sensor markers, actual impact point, estimated impact point, and a side panel with per-sensor distances, timings, deltas, and final coordinates.
6. Add configuration controls for target size, sensor positions, sensor depth, and noise parameters, with validation for unstable or invalid layouts.
7. Add diagnostics: miss distance, residual/error reporting, and solver confidence so users can see not just the answer but how trustworthy it is.
8. Make the architecture 4-sensor-ready by shaping the config and solver interfaces now, without forcing full 4-sensor solving into the first release unless you want that expanded.
9. Add persistence for the last-used setup and presets for common layouts, then prepare the app for static Netlify deployment.
10. Verify with unit tests for geometry and solver correctness plus manual browser checks for clicking, resizing, reconfiguration, and invalid sensor setups.

**What’s included**
- Browser-based simulation first
- Rectangular target customization
- 3 sensors in v1
- Configurable sensor depth behind the target
- Detailed visible calculations per sensor
- Advanced configurable timing/error modeling
- Clean path to future real sensor input

**What’s deliberately deferred**
- Live hardware input
- Backend persistence or accounts
- Arbitrary polygon targets
- Multipath/reflection physics
- Full production-grade 4-sensor multilateration, unless you want to promote that into v1

**Recommendation**
Start with 3 sensors as the working solver, but design the solver API and config model so a 4th sensor can be added later for comparison or accuracy improvement without reworking the UI and data flow.

I’ve saved the detailed execution plan to session memory. If you want, I can now revise this plan in one of two directions:
1. Promote full 4-sensor solving into v1.
2. Keep v1 tighter and treat the 4th sensor purely as a later extension.

I’m starting the implementation by checking the workspace state and loading the saved plan so I can scaffold the app and wire the core simulation modules in the right order.

**Considering project setup**

I need to scaffold a project, and I'm thinking about whether to use `create_new_workspace`. Maybe not since there's an existing workspace. It might be better to manually create `package.json` and install dependencies. I could use `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts`, but that could prompt for input. Since the user asked to start implementation in an existing folder, I might consider running the command to scaffold and then edit as needed. I'll use `run_in_terminal` for that.

**Setting up development environment**

I might need to establish a development server background. I think I can keep it running for now, but I might need to inspect files or terminate the server later if needed. I'll probably use the list directory function or check for changed files, although that may not be necessary at this point. First, I think I should read through some default app files, like package.json, after making a tool call. It might help to gather context from key files in parallel.

**Planning implementation steps**

I need to create files, and using a file creation tool for multiple files might be easier. First, I should implement the app and check if I need to install any extra packages. I might include custom CSS. Then, I’m considering a simple Gauss-Newton least squares method for TDOA across three sensors, focusing on a 2D target plane. For measuring and estimating travel times, I need to explore using gradient descent or Gauss-Newton and ensure everything is simple yet robust. I'll also work with components and types, possibly using vitest for testing.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",

**Setting up testing environment**

I can add a test script like `"test": "vitest run"` and install vitest. It might also be good to consider using npm for this, so I'll edit the package and run `npm install vitest`, possibly with `-D` for development. I think I can keep it simple without extra dependencies. I'll need to create various files for the project, including types, components, and stubs. Finally, I should check the current tsconfig.app for JSX import resolution to make sure everything works smoothly.

**Modifying TypeScript Configuration**

I need to modify the TypeScript configuration to possibly include globals for Vitest, but I won't actually use those globals. I think editing my package.json script and maybe the Netlify settings is a good next step. I also need to create files, potentially multiple ones. Using create_file looks easier than applying patches to existing files. I'm considering crafting types carefully, like defining 2D and 3D points, as well as sensor and configuration profiles, to ensure everything is streamlined.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "DM7elk1ay32aK98366Chr8/6Xffp4IAxopUfGwBL74Lx3egeausz9eAco5Q/1VBusbxWaidXwjnN82cFcDknPXbVW1vMWOZvcFG0pfM5O/qpY94mhohmOnIxfrwZU+gQycEVSnGL6qNbgxpeYjlHkWTXg2/UH71mLz+exLEdpOaQAdKtTVam27bAIwurm3eDQ5D5C4ChLH9NakC2kNxFr8m6jjvi8Oh46C1j6aJVnIwiRVqF73RVPFxihtK70OxCMy6uMqYBcdfKDFMmPuH3WCA1E2waBKnRitatXCaoPTOG93pVOftneHs/AreFNSYvZeLazhZasAAL214ivJpM0ZzanRA969V4167wo38KEL1muO34MuZaMQhEBcLxX3S/E5DCiby1+dXClDIc9/LysQ=="
}

**Defining Noise Profiles and Depth**

The NoiseProfile parameters should include enabled status, timing jitter, clock drift, temperature, and speed variation. For the sensor's z-axis, I’m considering that a negative value indicates depth. Since sensor positions relate to the target plane, I want to allow edits to x, y, and z. It might simplify things to label z as "depth," figuring out how to handle user-selected configurable depth values. I’ll use positive depth in the Sensor type and convert it to a negative z value for calculations involving 3D points.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "kzqzOC0Q/dZzQmxYWHMzOVLP9WPcfOftWAsWkQpDANcZZXNsiuy17F4aSrqEAV9fJq+R2NItp90SVHWE9IsabkiWbwWiE5Ka/xXoGkoaaF5tof8n7aHTvKlKKoGdoDOOwCDlU7PhBZMA3Eq19zxGvpdJRBNEzv020YXoX7JkXDilRtd/SDs0zHWDxvD+jsZbJsrWtZnJZcBTxf/Ms1jDKMrDMG+vDQU3tfHMEVyG6bhzxrGEjM8wCaUZtqDauxFyvdwL5nENLrgSX5C/Il19oJh989hprfb1jQlKDizvZQHA59FqF7jISm2pavLlWrNTZwmj9OSl0NTyzCLUMQPdAYqEDS5sRmHgzcERfCVbOQfZ11oiKILyBwduwGP541zpv5XFaQv7hPvrO0GD3UjzsQ=="
}

**Mapping coordinate systems**

I’m thinking about using a coordinate system with an origin at the target center to make things easier. The x-coordinates would range from -w/2 to w/2 and the y-coordinates from -h/2 to h/2. I’ll position sensors at the corners, and I believe it’s good to have three corners set up. The configuration values will depend on the target size, so I'll use a function like `buildCornerSensors(target)` to generate those. 

For the display, I’ll use an interactive SVG with a viewBox to set the target coordinates. I need to render rectangles, grids, and the sensors.  I also think I should compute points based on the user’s clicks and convert the screen to target coordinates. I might set up a SensorPanel to show details per sensor, including measurements.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "fnsNt1gdDge/PGrlE9Oypd5mLhae/czyc3ZJao4nWcCx5fhQyUk6oawE7cedgT/5nQz+urGpG0jw0kvoHDfgQBE6xMaKmWU6w6Irwsxu/z6rtkcHVkg/l8MNNqYbGVXgpTD+Huz07cGectb1xG9QDRWs+G089jhbx76HTr45p7hYVarxxZCds8KsvgmQiEtAxs4a7HOa2kxpE9H0VYsZc0v6ea4unwQHl8CIwgT4xNaPv/I3QsyUTtFZg3N/tZyDFFqHBXMjwIWWZrxS1WwvJBaWMtqSpcRzfhEz9tMPFP7nczRLpTaAOpXmh3nJG2bL7zC8HiOevr6SHu+EnBIsuk7v+s/FSSEURjP4cFkgPQ0ZULn0GbpW5+aFEpegtEtIX8ksROibu/QhIILzqHHk+g=="
}

**Designing the ConfigPanel**

I'm working on the ConfigPanel for inputs related to the target, sensors, and noise. I’m considering allowing an optional fourth sensor, since the initial version only included three. Maybe we could hide the fourth sensor option but give a toggle for `showFourthSensor` to keep it configurable. 

While it might complicate things, I could implement a disabled row for the fourth sensor. Our solver already handles multiple sensors, even four, with the least-squares method, so it would work. Supporting this option now sounds good! We can allow selection between three or four sensors.

}

**Implementing the ConfigPanel**

The user mentioned starting the implementation, so it's okay to include new features if they’re straightforward. I’ll set up the ConfigPanel with options for target width and height, as well as a sensors table that includes x, y, depth, bias, and an option for up to four sensors. I should also consider adding noise settings. Validation messages will be important too; the app can compute validation issues and have the panel display those messages effectively.

  "kind": "thinking",

}

**Considering app design elements**

I’m thinking about speed of sound, sensor counts, and maybe pairing deltas for the app. I should use `useState` to load initial config from storage. I’ll compute the count of enabled sensors and deal with measurements while considering noise. Maybe `useEffect` can help with persistence. There's a question about using `startTransition` for click updates. I’ll avoid `useMemo` unless absolutely necessary and aim for a warm design that avoids typical defaults and keeps it intentional.

**Planning font and testing setup**

I'm looking into font options since I can't import certain fonts. I might use Georgia, but 'Azeret Mono' isn't available, so a CSS stack with "IBM Plex Sans", "Avenir Next", and sans-serif could work instead. I can also import Google Fonts using `@import` in my `index.css`. For the UI, I definitely need some tests, maybe creating `geometry.test.ts` and `solver.test.ts`. I’ll install packages for Vitest, and I’m considering how to handle file creation for those tests efficiently.

I need a progress update after about five tool calls since we have quite a few already. Before making any edits, I should provide this update first. Once I have the information, I can use the `apply_patch` function for existing files. It might be efficient to combine multiple files into one patch call, which seems like a good way to streamline the process. Let’s get that update sorted out!

**Determining sensor data**

I’m considering the need for actual delta readings for each sensor. It seems like having accurate and possibly noisy delta values could provide better insights. It's important to analyze how the sensors are performing and what sort of fluctuations we see over time. I should think about the implications of noisy delta versus clean readings and how that might affect decision-making based on this data. Let's ensure we get the right information here!

I need to create new files in a batch; this could include types, library files, and components. I wonder if I can create about 9 files in parallel. That should be okay. I just need to make sure there’s a preamble as well.

        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport type SimulationState = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  noise: NoiseProfile",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  impact: Coordinate",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport type Preset = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  id: string",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  name: string",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  description: string",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  state: SimulationState",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 67,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/geometry.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/geometry.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/geometry.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  SensorConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  SensorMeasurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n} from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport const DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE_CELSIUS = 20",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function getSpeedOfSound(temperatureCelsius: number): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return 331.3 + temperatureCelsius * 0.606",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function clampImpact(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  impact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): Coordinate {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    x: clamp(impact.x, -target.width / 2, target.width / 2),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    y: clamp(impact.y, -target.height / 2, target.height / 2),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function isImpactWithinTarget(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  impact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): boolean {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    Math.abs(impact.x) <= target.width / 2 &&",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    Math.abs(impact.y) <= target.height / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function computeDistance(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  impact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensor: Pick<SensorConfig, 'x' | 'y' | 'depth'>,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const dx = impact.x - sensor.x",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const dy = impact.y - sensor.y",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + sensor.depth * sensor.depth)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function generateIdealMeasurements(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  impact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  temperatureCelsius = DEFAULT_TEMPERATURE_CELSIUS,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): SensorMeasurement[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const speedOfSound = getSpeedOfSound(temperatureCelsius)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return sensors",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    .filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    .map((sensor) => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const distance = computeDistance(impact, sensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const idealTimeSeconds = distance / speedOfSound",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        sensorId: sensor.id,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        label: sensor.label,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        distance,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        idealTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        noisyTimeSeconds: idealTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        deltaMicros: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function getMissDistance(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 67,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  actualImpact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate | null,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 70,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 70,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!estimatedImpact) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return Number.NaN",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 72,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 72,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 73,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 73,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 74,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 74,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const dx = actualImpact.x - estimatedImpact.x",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 75,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const dy = actualImpact.y - estimatedImpact.y",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 76,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 76,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 77,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 77,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 78,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 78,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 79,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 79,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 80,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 80,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction clamp(value: number, minimum: number, maximum: number): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 81,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 81,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return Math.min(Math.max(value, minimum), maximum)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 82,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 82,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 83,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 83,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 84,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 84,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/noise.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/noise.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/noise.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { NoiseProfile, SensorConfig, SensorMeasurement } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function applyNoiseProfile(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  noise: NoiseProfile,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  random = Math.random,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): SensorMeasurement[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!noise.enabled) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return measurements.map((measurement) => ({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      ...measurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      noisyTimeSeconds: measurement.idealTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      deltaMicros: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }))",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const globalSpeedOffset =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    ((random() * 2 - 1) * noise.speedVariationPercent) / 100",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const driftSeconds = noise.clockDriftMicros / 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return measurements.map((measurement) => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const sensor = sensors.find((candidate) => candidate.id === measurement.sensorId)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const biasSeconds = (sensor?.biasMicros ?? 0) / 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const jitterSeconds = gaussianNoise(random) * noise.timingJitterMicros / 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const noisyTimeSeconds =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      measurement.idealTimeSeconds * (1 + globalSpeedOffset) +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      driftSeconds +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      biasSeconds +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      jitterSeconds",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      ...measurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      noisyTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      deltaMicros: (noisyTimeSeconds - measurement.idealTimeSeconds) * 1_000_000,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction gaussianNoise(random: () => number): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let first = random()",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let second = random()",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (first === 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    first = Number.MIN_VALUE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (second === 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    second = Number.MIN_VALUE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return Math.sqrt(-2 * Math.log(first)) * Math.cos(2 * Math.PI * second)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { clampImpact, computeDistance } from '../geometry'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport type {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  SensorConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  SensorMeasurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  SolverResult,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  TraceEntry,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n} from '../../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ntype SolverInput = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst MAX_ITERATIONS = 16",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst EPSILON = 1e-6",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function solveTdoa(input: SolverInput): SolverResult {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const activeSensors = input.sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (activeSensors.length < 3 || input.measurements.length < 3) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return buildFailure('Need at least 3 active sensors to solve.', 0)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const measurementsById = new Map(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const referenceMeasurement = [...input.measurements].sort(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    (left, right) => left.noisyTimeSeconds - right.noisyTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )[0]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const referenceSensor = activeSensors.find(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    (sensor) => sensor.id === referenceMeasurement.sensorId,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!referenceSensor) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return buildFailure('Reference sensor missing from configuration.', 0)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const trace: TraceEntry[] = [",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      label: 'Reference sensor',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      value: `${referenceSensor.label} (${referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s)`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  ]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let estimate = clampImpact(getInitialGuess(activeSensors, input.measurements), input.target)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let converged = false",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let iterations = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (let iteration = 0; iteration < MAX_ITERATIONS; iteration += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    iterations = iteration + 1",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const refDistance = computeDistance(estimate, referenceSensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const refTime = referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const jacobianRows: Array<{ dx: number; dy: number; residual: number }> = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    for (const sensor of activeSensors) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      if (sensor.id === referenceSensor.id) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        continue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const measurement = measurementsById.get(sensor.id)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      if (!measurement) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        continue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 67,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
