        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const sensorDistance = computeDistance(estimate, sensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 70,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 70,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const predictedDelta = (sensorDistance - refDistance) / input.speedOfSound",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const measuredDelta = measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - refTime",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 72,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 72,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const residual = predictedDelta - measuredDelta",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 73,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 73,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const dx =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 74,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 74,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        (estimate.x - sensor.x) / (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(sensorDistance, EPSILON)) -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 75,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        (estimate.x - referenceSensor.x) /",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 76,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 76,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(refDistance, EPSILON))",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 77,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 77,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const dy =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 78,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 78,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        (estimate.y - sensor.y) / (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(sensorDistance, EPSILON)) -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 79,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 79,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        (estimate.y - referenceSensor.y) /",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 80,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 80,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(refDistance, EPSILON))",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 81,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 81,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 82,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 82,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      jacobianRows.push({ dx, dy, residual })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 83,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 83,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 84,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 84,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 85,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 85,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (jacobianRows.length < 2) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 86,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 86,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      return buildFailure('Insufficient TDOA pairs for solving.', iterations)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 87,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 87,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 88,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 88,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 89,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 89,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    let a11 = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 90,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 90,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    let a12 = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 91,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 91,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    let a22 = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 92,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 92,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    let b1 = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 93,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 93,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    let b2 = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 94,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 94,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 95,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 95,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    for (const row of jacobianRows) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 96,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      a11 += row.dx * row.dx",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 97,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 97,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      a12 += row.dx * row.dy",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 98,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 98,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      a22 += row.dy * row.dy",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 99,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 99,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      b1 += row.dx * row.residual",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 100,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 100,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      b2 += row.dy * row.residual",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 101,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 101,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 102,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 102,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 103,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 103,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const determinant = a11 * a22 - a12 * a12",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 104,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 104,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (Math.abs(determinant) < EPSILON) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 105,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 105,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      trace.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 106,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 106,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 107,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 107,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        value: 'Degenerate geometry prevented a stable solve.',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 108,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 108,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 109,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 109,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      break",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 110,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 110,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 111,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 111,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 112,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 112,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const stepX = (-a22 * b1 + a12 * b2) / determinant",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 113,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 113,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const stepY = (a12 * b1 - a11 * b2) / determinant",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 114,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 114,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 115,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 115,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    estimate = clampImpact(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 116,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 116,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 117,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 117,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        x: estimate.x + stepX,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 118,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 118,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        y: estimate.y + stepY,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 119,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 119,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 120,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 120,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      input.target,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 121,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 121,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 122,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 122,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 123,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 123,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    trace.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 124,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 124,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 125,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 125,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      value: `dx ${stepX.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}, dy ${stepY.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 126,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 126,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 127,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 127,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 128,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 128,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (Math.sqrt(stepX * stepX + stepY * stepY) < 0.001) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 129,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 129,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      converged = true",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 130,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 130,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      break",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 131,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 131,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 132,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 132,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 133,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 133,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 134,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 134,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const residualMicros = computeResidualMicros(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 135,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 135,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    estimate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 136,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 136,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    activeSensors,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 137,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 137,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.measurements,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 138,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 138,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    referenceSensor,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 139,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 139,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    referenceMeasurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 140,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 140,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.speedOfSound,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 141,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 141,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 142,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 142,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 143,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 143,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  trace.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 144,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 144,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    label: 'Estimated impact',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 145,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 145,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    value: `${estimate.x.toFixed(2)}, ${estimate.y.toFixed(2)} ${input.target.units}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 146,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 146,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 147,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 147,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  trace.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 148,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 148,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    label: 'Residual',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 149,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 149,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    value: `${residualMicros.toFixed(2)} microseconds RMS`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 150,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 150,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 151,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 151,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 152,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 152,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 153,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 153,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    estimatedImpact: estimate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 154,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 154,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    converged,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 155,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 155,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    iterations,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 156,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 156,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    residualMicros,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 157,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 157,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    confidence: getConfidence(residualMicros, converged),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 158,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 158,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    trace,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 159,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 159,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 160,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 160,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 161,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 161,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 162,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 162,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction computeResidualMicros(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 163,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 163,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimate: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 164,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 164,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  activeSensors: SensorConfig[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 165,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 165,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 166,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 166,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  referenceSensor: SensorConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 167,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 167,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  referenceMeasurement: SensorMeasurement,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 168,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 168,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 169,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 169,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 170,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 170,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const measurementMap = new Map(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 171,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 171,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 172,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 172,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 173,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 173,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const refDistance = computeDistance(estimate, referenceSensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 174,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 174,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const refTime = referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 175,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 175,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let sum = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 176,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 176,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let count = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 177,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 177,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 178,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 178,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const sensor of activeSensors) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 179,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 179,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (sensor.id === referenceSensor.id) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 180,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 180,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      continue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 181,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 181,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 182,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 182,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 183,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 183,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const measurement = measurementMap.get(sensor.id)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 184,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 184,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (!measurement) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 185,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 185,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      continue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 186,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 186,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 187,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 187,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 188,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 188,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const distance = computeDistance(estimate, sensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 189,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 189,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const predictedDelta = (distance - refDistance) / speedOfSound",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 190,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 190,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const measuredDelta = measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - refTime",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 191,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 191,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const residual = (predictedDelta - measuredDelta) * 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 192,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 192,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    sum += residual * residual",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 193,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 193,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    count += 1",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 194,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 194,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 195,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 195,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 196,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 196,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return count > 0 ? Math.sqrt(sum / count) : Number.NaN",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 197,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 197,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 198,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 198,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 199,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 199,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction getInitialGuess(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 200,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 200,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 201,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 201,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 202,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 202,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): Coordinate {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 203,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 203,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const measurementMap = new Map(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 204,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 204,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 205,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 205,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 206,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 206,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 207,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 207,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let totalWeight = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 208,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 208,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let x = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 209,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 209,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let y = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 210,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 210,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 211,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 211,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const sensor of sensors) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 212,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 212,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const measurement = measurementMap.get(sensor.id)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 213,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 213,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (!measurement) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 214,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 214,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      continue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 215,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 215,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 216,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 216,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 217,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 217,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const weight = 1 / Math.max(measurement.noisyTimeSeconds, EPSILON)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 218,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 218,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    totalWeight += weight",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 219,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 219,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    x += sensor.x * weight",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 220,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 220,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    y += sensor.y * weight",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 221,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 221,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 222,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 222,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 223,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 223,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (totalWeight === 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 224,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 224,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return { x: 0, y: 0 }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 225,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 225,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 226,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 226,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 227,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 227,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 228,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 228,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    x: x / totalWeight,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 229,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 229,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    y: y / totalWeight,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 230,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 230,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 231,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 231,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 232,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 232,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 233,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 233,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction getConfidence(residualMicros: number, converged: boolean) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 234,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 234,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!converged || Number.isNaN(residualMicros)) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 235,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 235,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return 'low' as const",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 236,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 236,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 237,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 237,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 238,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 238,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (residualMicros <= 10) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 239,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 239,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return 'high' as const",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 240,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 240,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 241,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 241,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 242,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 242,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (residualMicros <= 40) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 243,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 243,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return 'medium' as const",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 244,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 244,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 245,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 245,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 246,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 246,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return 'low' as const",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 247,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 247,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 248,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 248,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 249,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 249,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction buildFailure(message: string, iterations: number): SolverResult {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 250,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 250,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 251,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 251,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    estimatedImpact: null,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 252,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 252,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    converged: false,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 253,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 253,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    iterations,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 254,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 254,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    residualMicros: Number.NaN,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 255,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 255,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    confidence: 'low',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 256,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 256,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    trace: [{ label: 'Solver', value: message }],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 257,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 257,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 258,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 258,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 259,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 259,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 260,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 260,
          "endColumn": 1

  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/multilateration.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/multilateration.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/multilateration.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { solveTdoa } from './tdoa'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport type { SensorConfig, SensorMeasurement, SolverResult, TargetConfig } from '../../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ntype MultilaterationInput = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function solveMultilateration(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  input: MultilaterationInput,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): SolverResult {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return solveTdoa(input)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {

  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { Preset, SensorConfig, SimulationState, TargetConfig } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport const DEFAULT_TARGET: TargetConfig = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  width: 120,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  height: 120,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  label: 'Square practice target',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  units: 'cm',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function buildDefaultSensors(target: TargetConfig): SensorConfig[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const halfWidth = target.width / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const halfHeight = target.height / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return [",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      id: 'sensor-a',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      label: 'Sensor A',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      x: -halfWidth,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      y: -halfHeight,",

    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function createDefaultState(): SimulationState {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",

          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      enabled: true,",

          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      timingJitterMicros: 12,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,

        }
      }
    ],
    [

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,

        }

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,

        }

          "startColumn": 1,

          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport const PRESETS: Preset[] = [",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 70,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 70,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    id: 'classic-square',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    name: 'Classic square',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 72,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 72,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    description: 'Three corners active with an optional fourth sensor ready for comparison.',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 73,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 73,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    state: createDefaultState(),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 74,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 74,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 75,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 76,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 76,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    id: 'wide-target',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 77,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 77,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    name: 'Wide target',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 78,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 78,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    description: 'A wider rectangle to explore how sensor spread changes the estimate.',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 79,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 79,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    state: {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 80,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 80,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      target: {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 81,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 81,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        width: 180,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 82,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 82,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        height: 90,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 83,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 83,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        label: 'Wide plate',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 84,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 84,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        units: 'cm',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 85,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 85,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 86,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 86,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      sensors: [",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 87,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 87,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 88,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 88,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          id: 'sensor-a',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 89,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 89,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 91,
          "endColumn": 1

    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,

        }

          "endColumn": 1

          "endColumn": 1

          "startColumn": 1,

    [
      {

      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          label: 'Sensor D',",

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 117,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

    ],

    ],

        }

      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 126,
          "endColumn": 1
        }

    ],

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 127,
          "endColumn": 1

          "endColumn": 1

      {
