{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/storage.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/storage.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/storage.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { SimulationState } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst STORAGE_KEY = 'bullet-simulator-state'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function loadStoredState(): SimulationState | null {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!hasStorage()) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const rawValue = window.localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!rawValue) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  try {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return JSON.parse(rawValue) as SimulationState",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  } catch {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function saveStoredState(state: SimulationState): void {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (!hasStorage()) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  window.localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(state))",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction hasStorage(): boolean {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return typeof window !== 'undefined' && 'localStorage' in window",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { Coordinate, SensorConfig, TargetConfig } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ntype TargetCanvasProps = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  actualImpact: Coordinate",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate | null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onImpactSelect: (impact: Coordinate) => void",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst VIEWBOX_SIZE = 240",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst MARGIN = 18",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function TargetCanvas({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  actualImpact,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimatedImpact,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onImpactSelect,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}: TargetCanvasProps) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const scaleX = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - MARGIN * 2) / target.width",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const scaleY = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - MARGIN * 2) / target.height",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const viewWidth = target.width * scale",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const viewHeight = target.height * scale",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const left = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - viewWidth) / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const top = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - viewHeight) / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  function toSvgPoint(point: Coordinate) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      x: left + (point.x + target.width / 2) * scale,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      y: top + (target.height / 2 - point.y) * scale,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  function handleClick(event: React.MouseEvent<SVGSVGElement>) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const bounds = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect()",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const svgX = ((event.clientX - bounds.left) / bounds.width) * VIEWBOX_SIZE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const svgY = ((event.clientY - bounds.top) / bounds.height) * VIEWBOX_SIZE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      svgX < left ||",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      svgX > left + viewWidth ||",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      svgY < top ||",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      svgY > top + viewHeight",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    ) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      return",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const x = (svgX - left) / scale - target.width / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const y = target.height / 2 - (svgY - top) / scale",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    onImpactSelect({ x, y })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const actualPoint = toSvgPoint(actualImpact)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const estimatedPoint = estimatedImpact ? toSvgPoint(estimatedImpact) : null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    <div className=\"target-card\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"panel-heading\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Target View</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <h2>{target.label}</h2>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">Click anywhere on the plate to generate the true impact location.</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <svg",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 67,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        className=\"target-svg\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        viewBox={`0 0 ${VIEWBOX_SIZE} ${VIEWBOX_SIZE}`}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        onClick={handleClick}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 70,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 70,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        role=\"img\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        aria-label=\"Interactive target surface\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 72,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 72,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      >",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 73,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 73,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <defs>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 74,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 74,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <pattern id=\"target-grid\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" patternUnits=\"userSpaceOnUse\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 75,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <path d=\"M 24 0 L 0 0 0 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.16)\" strokeWidth=\"1\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 76,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 76,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          </pattern>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 77,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 77,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        </defs>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 78,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 78,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width={VIEWBOX_SIZE} height={VIEWBOX_SIZE} rx=\"24\" className=\"target-frame\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 79,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 79,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <rect",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 80,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 80,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          x={left}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 81,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 81,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          y={top}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 82,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 82,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          width={viewWidth}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 83,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 83,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          height={viewHeight}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 84,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 84,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          rx=\"20\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 85,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 85,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          className=\"target-plate\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 86,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 86,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 87,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 87,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <rect",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 88,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 88,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          x={left}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 89,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 89,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          y={top}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 90,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 90,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          width={viewWidth}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 91,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 91,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          height={viewHeight}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 92,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 92,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          rx=\"20\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 93,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 93,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          fill=\"url(#target-grid)\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 94,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 94,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          pointerEvents=\"none\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 95,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 95,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 96,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <line x1={left} x2={left + viewWidth} y1={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} y2={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} className=\"target-axis\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 97,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 97,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <line y1={top} y2={top + viewHeight} x1={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} x2={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} className=\"target-axis\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 98,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 98,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        {sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled).map((sensor) => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 99,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 99,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          const sensorPoint = toSvgPoint({ x: sensor.x, y: sensor.y })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 100,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 100,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 101,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 101,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <g key={sensor.id}>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 102,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 102,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <circle cx={sensorPoint.x} cy={sensorPoint.y} r=\"7\" className=\"sensor-node\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 103,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 103,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <text x={sensorPoint.x + 10} y={sensorPoint.y - 10} className=\"sensor-label\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 104,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 104,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                {sensor.label}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 105,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 105,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              </text>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 106,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 106,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            </g>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 107,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 107,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 108,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 108,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        })}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 109,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 109,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <circle cx={actualPoint.x} cy={actualPoint.y} r=\"6\" className=\"impact-actual\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 110,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 110,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        {estimatedPoint ? (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 111,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 111,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 112,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 112,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <circle cx={estimatedPoint.x} cy={estimatedPoint.y} r=\"9\" className=\"impact-estimated-ring\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 113,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 113,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <circle cx={estimatedPoint.x} cy={estimatedPoint.y} r=\"5\" className=\"impact-estimated\" />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 114,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 114,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <line",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 115,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 115,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              x1={actualPoint.x}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 116,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 116,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              y1={actualPoint.y}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 117,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 117,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              x2={estimatedPoint.x}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 118,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 118,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              y2={estimatedPoint.y}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 119,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 119,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              className=\"impact-connection\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 120,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 120,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            />",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 121,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 121,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          </>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 122,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 122,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        ) : null}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 123,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 123,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </svg>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 124,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 124,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"legend-row\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 125,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 125,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch actual\"></i> True impact</span>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 126,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 126,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch estimated\"></i> Estimated impact</span>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 127,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 127,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch sensor\"></i> Active sensor</span>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 128,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 128,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 129,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 129,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 130,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 130,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],

      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 131,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 131,
          "endColumn": 1
        }

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 132,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 132,

          "startColumn": 1,

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,

    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { SensorMeasurement } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ntype SensorPanelProps = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function SensorPanel({ measurements }: SensorPanelProps) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const reference = [...measurements].sort(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    (left, right) => left.noisyTimeSeconds - right.noisyTimeSeconds,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )[0]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    <section className=\"panel card sensor-panel\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"panel-heading compact\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Sensor Readout</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <h2>Arrival timing</h2>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">Distances, ideal arrivals, noisy arrivals, and TDOA deltas update on every click.</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"table-shell\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <table>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <thead>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <tr>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>Sensor</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>Distance</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>Ideal</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>Noisy</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>Delta</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <th>TDOA vs ref</th>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            </tr>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          </thead>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <tbody>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            {measurements.map((measurement) => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              const tdoaMicros =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                (measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - reference.noisyTimeSeconds) * 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                <tr key={measurement.sensorId}>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{measurement.label}</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{measurement.distance.toFixed(2)}</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{measurement.idealTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{measurement.noisyTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{measurement.deltaMicros.toFixed(2)} us</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  <td>{tdoaMicros.toFixed(2)} us</td>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                </tr>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            })}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          </tbody>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        </table>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    </section>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],

  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { NoiseProfile, SensorConfig, TargetConfig } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ntype ConfigPanelProps = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  noise: NoiseProfile",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  presets: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  validationIssues: string[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onTargetChange: (field: 'width' | 'height', value: number) => void",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onSensorChange: (sensorId: string, field: keyof SensorConfig, value: number | boolean) => void",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onNoiseChange: (field: keyof NoiseProfile, value: number | boolean) => void",

          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1

    ],

      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,

    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function ConfigPanel({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target,",

          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

    ],
    [
      {

          "endLineNumber": 20,

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

    ],
    [

    ],
    [
      {

    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1

    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  onPresetSelect,",

          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}: ConfigPanelProps) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    <section className=\"panel card config-panel\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"panel-heading compact\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Configuration</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <h2>Target and sensor layout</h2>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">Tune geometry, toggle the optional fourth sensor, and stress the solver with timing noise.</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"config-actions\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <label>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          Preset",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <select onChange={(event) => onPresetSelect(event.target.value)} defaultValue=\"\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            <option value=\"\" disabled>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              Choose a preset",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            </option>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            {presets.map((preset) => (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <option key={preset.id} value={preset.id}>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                {preset.name}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }

    [
      {

        "range": {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <button type=\"button\" onClick={onReset}>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          Reset default",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      </div>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      <div className=\"config-grid two-up\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <label>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          Width ({target.units})",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <input",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            type=\"number\"",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            min=\"30\"",
        "range": {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            value={target.width}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            onChange={(event) => onTargetChange('width', Number(event.target.value))}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,

        }
      }

    [

          "startColumn": 1,

    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,

    ],

      {

    [
      {
        "text": "\n        {sensors.map((sensor) => (",

          "startColumn": 1,

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 87,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 88,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 88,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 89,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n                    onSensorChange(sensor.id, 'enabled', event.target.checked)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 90,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 90,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 92,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 93,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 93,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 94,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 94,
          "endColumn": 1
        }

    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 95,

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 96,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,
          "endColumn": 1
        }

    ],

      {

    [
      {
        "text": "\n                  onChange={(event) =>",
        "range": {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 202,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      {validationIssues.length > 0 ? (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 203,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 203,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <div className=\"validation-box\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 204,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 204,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p className=\"validation-box__title\">Configuration issues</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 205,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 205,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startLineNumber": 206,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 206,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            {validationIssues.map((issue) => (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 207,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 207,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n              <li key={issue}>{issue}</li>",

          "startLineNumber": 208,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 208,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n            ))}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 209,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 209,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 211,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      ) : (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 212,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 212,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        <div className=\"validation-box ok\">",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 213,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 213,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p className=\"validation-box__title\">Layout status</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 214,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 214,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n          <p>The current layout is solvable with the active sensors.</p>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 215,

**Planning file modifications**

I see that I need to modify existing files. It might also be a good idea to create tests and set up Netlify, but I think I should update everything before making those changes. Let’s ensure I'm thorough in the process so I don't overlook anything important. It’s always better to approach things systematically to make sure everything functions well after the updates!

The simulation core and component files are in place. I’m now wiring them into the app shell, replacing the Vite starter styles, and adding validation, presets, persistence, and tests so the first build is meaningful.

**Considering file organization**

I'm thinking of creating a `src/lib/validation.ts` file to keep the app cleaner and more organized. This would help me manage everything more effectively. I believe having a separate file for validation could be useful for testing as well. So, I'm planning to create this file along with any necessary tests for it in Netlify. It looks like this will help streamline the structure of the app!

{

}

I’m filling in the remaining support files now so the app has validation logic, automated checks for the math, and a deployment config alongside the main UI wiring.
