{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/validation.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/validation.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/validation.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { SensorConfig, TargetConfig } from '../types/simulation'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nexport function validateLayout(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): string[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const issues: string[] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const activeSensors = sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (activeSensors.length < 3) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    issues.push('Activate at least three sensors before solving.')",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (activeSensors.length > 4) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    issues.push('The current solver supports up to four active sensors.')",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const sensor of activeSensors) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (sensor.depth <= 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      issues.push(`${sensor.label} must sit behind the target with a positive depth.`)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (Math.abs(sensor.x) > target.width || Math.abs(sensor.y) > target.height) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      issues.push(`${sensor.label} is positioned far outside the target footprint.`)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (let index = 0; index < activeSensors.length; index += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const left = activeSensors[index]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    for (let compareIndex = index + 1; compareIndex < activeSensors.length; compareIndex += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 30,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const right = activeSensors[compareIndex]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 31,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 31,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const sameProjectedPoint = left.x === right.x && left.y === right.y",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 32,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 32,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const sameDepth = left.depth === right.depth",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 33,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 33,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      if (sameProjectedPoint && sameDepth) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 34,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        issues.push(`${left.label} and ${right.label} overlap.`)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 35,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 35,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 36,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 36,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 37,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 37,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 38,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 38,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 39,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 39,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (activeSensors.length >= 3) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 40,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 40,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const [first, second, third] = activeSensors",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 41,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 41,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const twiceArea = Math.abs(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 42,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 42,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      first.x * (second.y - third.y) +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 43,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 43,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        second.x * (third.y - first.y) +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 44,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 44,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        third.x * (first.y - second.y),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (twiceArea < 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      issues.push('The first three active sensors are nearly colinear on the target plane.')",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return [...new Set(issues)]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/geometry.test.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/geometry.test.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/geometry.test.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport { computeDistance, generateIdealMeasurements, getSpeedOfSound } from '../geometry'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nconst sensor = {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  id: 'sensor-a',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  label: 'Sensor A',",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  x: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  y: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  depth: 10,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  biasMicros: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  enabled: true,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ndescribe('geometry', () => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  it('computes a straight-line distance to the sensor plane', () => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const distance = computeDistance({ x: 3, y: 4 }, sensor)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(distance).toBeCloseTo(Math.sqrt(125), 6)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  it('generates ideal arrival times from the configured speed of sound', () => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const speed = getSpeedOfSound(20)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const measurements = generateIdealMeasurements({ x: 0, y: 0 }, [sensor], 20)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(measurements).toHaveLength(1)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(measurements[0].distance).toBeCloseTo(10, 6)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(measurements[0].idealTimeSeconds).toBeCloseTo(10 / speed, 6)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n})",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/solver.test.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/solver.test.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/__tests__/solver.test.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 1,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport { generateIdealMeasurements, getSpeedOfSound } from '../geometry'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 2,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 2,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport { createDefaultState } from '../presets'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 3,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 3,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nimport { solveTdoa } from '../solver/tdoa'",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 4,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 4,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 5,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 5,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\ndescribe('solveTdoa', () => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 6,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 6,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  it('reconstructs the true impact from perfect 3-sensor timing data', () => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 7,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 7,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const state = createDefaultState()",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 8,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 8,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const sensors = state.sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 9,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const measurements = generateIdealMeasurements(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 10,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 10,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      state.impact,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 11,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 11,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      sensors,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 12,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 12,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      state.noise.temperatureCelsius,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 13,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 13,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 14,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 14,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const speedOfSound = getSpeedOfSound(state.noise.temperatureCelsius)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 15,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 15,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 16,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 16,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const result = solveTdoa({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 17,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 17,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      target: state.target,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 18,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 18,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      sensors,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 19,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 19,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      measurements,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 20,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 20,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      speedOfSound,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 21,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 21,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 22,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 22,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 23,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 23,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(result.estimatedImpact).not.toBeNull()",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 24,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 24,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(result.converged).toBe(true)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 25,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 25,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(result.estimatedImpact?.x).toBeCloseTo(state.impact.x, 2)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 26,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 26,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    expect(result.estimatedImpact?.y).toBeCloseTo(state.impact.y, 2)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 27,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 27,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 28,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 28,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n})",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 29,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 29,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 30,

          "endLineNumber": 30,

    ],
    [
      {

          "endLineNumber": 8,

      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {

          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 9,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}

**Considering potential bugs and adjustments**

I’m thinking there might be a bug with `generateIdealMeasurements` filtering enabled sensors while passing all `state.sensors`. There could also be some validations needed for active sensors that are way off target. The preset select uses JSON parse but lacks a structured clone. If the target dimensions are too low, I wonder if we should consider clamping them. Displaying units for miss distance could be useful in the Diagnostics panel, maybe just showing the number there. I'm pondering whether to add a `units` prop to improve clarity in the UI.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "N+CHYVX3ekkYILHPF4EEF9Qd6w1ckGscBrSRjgt4opSf2ml/yCRzi0LYTkLiht74Zr1J3xVKcpJO3h3EGk+wTX18tea74suFYF7UjtVWLN2vQCxCSM3FwPhPgxK+loLGL9l+o3UN6EeHfk/gesBmruz9JlAYxwDs5D8TnvTliH0MenBGw5njMfjRQfFSy40VGxwOCgIaxC9h3NUfqPSck0OqQFXBk87KfrkdmLBdgFYfoVg6Vjcc4nd7dDeRazEAEk/51/kEIlADLmGphq4hNm0lBsIoHyQPBKSagPoeNWvblvPdn4F0JdTTTEyidHQZP9ofwacDWHtt7U3Yci47gjL5hxUWeuJZPRxzVxHPy/dwQZuhiEfhrg9ycANggMsZX5YgL5pk97zsrLZmJOR54Q=="
}

**Improving measurement handling**

I’m considering that the app might still pass measurements from enabled sensors, even if there are fewer than three. If no measurements exist, then `reference` could end up being undefined, which isn’t ideal. I should make the `SensorPanel` more robust by returning a note when `measurements.length` is zero. Also, there’s a concern that the `ConfigPanel` may not reset the default value when selecting the same preset. I think I need to ensure the app can handle the `SensorPanel` even with fewer than one measurement while fixing any potential breakages there.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "Kw5svXBA+ftkZcFzd7OELyU24/JeP0Gf16Mdfvo9DqfGjEJNNbDFGO7agihy+R10z15X0sAovc3+eJ6aD5ExN8MieCWtMzP8IO+S2MgdD4SsGRAYk0zoC9munJEDsf4XT6bxfLsUMXRryNRBgSpqKTO5IB3wqsUmW5Fdi68j0wNmoF2zDP1Mve/fuCw4x2Ckx+7oW4oE70n+OyHyEiI0blz42BVW+GAEfv5T4aoYv9Og4VktanGMNG5qG4dkR29qckF57stkjLYTKHxgoCgQ6KFVssO+Kk4c7y1Cl1a97zI/NQuk8JqYpudxidFMzkY/oiN5wpwgdOpColEuNg+2+xX6BJNcR+qT7vZYH2zrvL2ZSozJ+xxcZNTKGBt6shZYXjSfV5eghtUb90BqOoc42g=="
}

**Considering code updates**

I’m thinking I might need to add "noUnusedParameters" in the `onTargetChange` field — that seems fine. I could also update the import order in the `multilat` file, which would be good too. I’ll need to check the `package.json` and possibly add a script for testing with `"test": "vitest run"`. Plus, I want to ensure there are no lint errors from the `TargetCanvas` import type in React. Let's approach this patch carefully!

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "5gjK1qRraaLHxlPvNS5pWSR/cplHe8h+6nlixRGabNMGuZP9euAhywfBAGaDHn6zDq2nW+dfj3X8KiEkpqSsjUs3hRWai0l25n6LpTmyudiMFMkquUSE7ZqSG6rVV/TdmTvmBrKGj9Eeajt+8KUYpg0qPjDrr4Sz69oVyk4gSutrUT9fVpKkq3WmUhmCfJO1SH3qH2+Qf6KL2TNIyZLd522wtmAK/sL0P31nX5QhHyWJX/rigatxU8HVtjcAf0wPDkJuAVboKXSzB7VY16lZnPxQ8Wq24gET5RxFhPpulCXrBrECRwzzE2i3JYLuTbyBoQD7pHVKnP8Ourvv7gxCf2Tf+J1TH36Rr///yHB0CcEAjX0y6lqeb2Y+bwwWhA73ScmTRkNqglZ5H9zRcTb7aQ=="
}

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "",
  "metadata": {
    "vscodeReasoningDone": true,
    "stopReason": "text"
  }
}

I’m replacing the generated starter files now with the actual simulator shell and the production-facing styles, plus a couple of robustness fixes in the new components before the first build.

{
```
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/package.json",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/package.json",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/package.json",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "{\n  \"name\": \"bullet\",\n  \"private\": true,\n  \"version\": \"0.0.0\",\n  \"type\": \"module\",\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"dev\": \"vite\",\n    \"build\": \"tsc -b && vite build\",\n    \"lint\": \"eslint .\",\n    \"preview\": \"vite preview\",\n    \"test\": \"vitest run\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"react\": \"^19.2.4\",\n    \"react-dom\": \"^19.2.4\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@eslint/js\": \"^9.39.4\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^24.12.0\",\n    \"@types/react\": \"^19.2.14\",\n    \"@types/react-dom\": \"^19.2.3\",\n    \"@vitejs/plugin-react\": \"^6.0.1\",\n    \"eslint\": \"^9.39.4\",\n    \"eslint-plugin-react-hooks\": \"^7.0.1\",\n    \"eslint-plugin-react-refresh\": \"^0.5.2\",\n    \"globals\": \"^17.4.0\",\n    \"typescript\": \"~5.9.3\",\n    \"typescript-eslint\": \"^8.57.0\",\n    \"vite\": \"^8.0.1\",\n    \"vitest\": \"^3.2.4\"\n  }\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 34,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```

```


{
  "id": "db6beb22-f97a-449c-a312-2a8a658662c0",
  "kind": "undoStop"
}

{
  "kind": "codeblockUri",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "isEdit": true
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { startTransition, useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport './App.css'\nimport { ConfigPanel } from './components/ConfigPanel'\nimport { DiagnosticsPanel } from './components/DiagnosticsPanel'\nimport { SensorPanel } from './components/SensorPanel'\nimport { TargetCanvas } from './components/TargetCanvas'\nimport { generateIdealMeasurements, getMissDistance, getSpeedOfSound } from './lib/geometry'\nimport { applyNoiseProfile } from './lib/noise'\nimport { PRESETS, createDefaultState } from './lib/presets'\nimport { solveMultilateration } from './lib/solver/multilateration'\nimport { solveTdoa } from './lib/solver/tdoa'\nimport { loadStoredState, saveStoredState } from './lib/storage'\nimport { validateLayout } from './lib/validation'\nimport type {\n  Coordinate,\n  NoiseProfile,\n  SensorConfig,\n  SimulationState,\n  TargetConfig,\n} from './types/simulation'\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [state, setState] = useState<SimulationState>(\n    () => loadStoredState() ?? createDefaultState(),\n  )\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    saveStoredState(state)\n  }, [state])\n\n  const activeSensors = state.sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)\n  const validationIssues = validateLayout(state.target, state.sensors)\n  const speedOfSound = getSpeedOfSound(state.noise.temperatureCelsius)\n  const idealMeasurements = generateIdealMeasurements(\n    state.impact,\n    state.sensors,\n    state.noise.temperatureCelsius,\n  )\n  const measurements = applyNoiseProfile(\n    idealMeasurements,\n    state.sensors,\n    state.noise,\n  )\n  const solver =\n    validationIssues.length === 0\n      ? activeSensors.length > 3\n        ? solveMultilateration({\n            target: state.target,\n            sensors: activeSensors,\n            measurements,\n            speedOfSound,\n          })\n        : solveTdoa({\n            target: state.target,\n            sensors: activeSensors,\n            measurements,\n            speedOfSound,\n          })\n      : {\n          estimatedImpact: null,\n          converged: false,\n          iterations: 0,\n          residualMicros: Number.NaN,\n          confidence: 'low' as const,\n          trace: validationIssues.map((issue) => ({\n            label: 'Validation',\n            value: issue,\n          })),\n        }\n  const missDistance = getMissDistance(state.impact, solver.estimatedImpact)\n\n  function updateTarget(field: keyof Pick<TargetConfig, 'width' | 'height'>, value: number) {\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState((current) => {\n        const target = {\n          ...current.target,\n          [field]: clampNumber(value, 30, 300),\n        }\n\n        return {\n          ...current,\n          target,\n          impact: clampCoordinate(current.impact, target),\n        }\n      })\n    })\n  }\n\n  function updateSensor(\n    sensorId: string,\n    field: keyof SensorConfig,\n    value: number | boolean,\n  ) {\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState((current) => ({\n        ...current,\n        sensors: current.sensors.map((sensor) =>\n          sensor.id === sensorId ? { ...sensor, [field]: value } : sensor,\n        ),\n      }))\n    })\n  }\n\n  function updateNoise(field: keyof NoiseProfile, value: number | boolean) {\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState((current) => ({\n        ...current,\n        noise: {\n          ...current.noise,\n          [field]: value,\n        },\n      }))\n    })\n  }\n\n  function updateImpact(impact: Coordinate) {\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState((current) => ({\n        ...current,\n        impact: clampCoordinate(impact, current.target),\n      }))\n    })\n  }\n\n  function applyPreset(presetId: string) {\n    const preset = PRESETS.find((candidate) => candidate.id === presetId)\n    if (!preset) {\n      return\n    }\n\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(preset.state)) as SimulationState)\n    })\n  }\n\n  function resetState() {\n    startTransition(() => {\n      setState(createDefaultState())\n    })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"app-shell\">\n      <section className=\"hero-panel card\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Acoustic Impact Simulator</p>\n          <h1>Simulate exactly where the bullet struck the target.</h1>\n        </div>\n        <p className=\"hero-copy\">\n          This prototype models a rectangular target, acoustic sensors mounted behind it,\n          noisy arrival timing, and a TDOA solver that reconstructs the impact point.\n        </p>\n        <div className=\"hero-stats\">\n          <div>\n            <span>Layout</span>\n            <strong>{activeSensors.length} active sensors</strong>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <span>Model</span>\n            <strong>2D plane + depth</strong>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <span>Physics</span>\n            <strong>{state.noise.enabled ? 'Noisy timing enabled' : 'Ideal timing only'}</strong>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n\n      <section className=\"workspace-grid\">\n        <div className=\"workspace-main\">\n          <TargetCanvas\n            target={state.target}\n            sensors={state.sensors}\n            actualImpact={state.impact}\n            estimatedImpact={solver.estimatedImpact}\n            onImpactSelect={updateImpact}\n          />\n          <SensorPanel measurements={measurements} />\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"workspace-side\">\n          <DiagnosticsPanel\n            actualImpact={state.impact}\n            estimatedImpact={solver.estimatedImpact}\n            missDistance={missDistance}\n            speedOfSound={speedOfSound}\n            activeSensorCount={activeSensors.length}\n            solver={solver}\n            units={state.target.units}\n          />\n          <ConfigPanel\n            target={state.target}\n            sensors={state.sensors}\n            noise={state.noise}\n            presets={PRESETS.map((preset) => ({ id: preset.id, name: preset.name }))}\n            validationIssues={validationIssues}\n            onTargetChange={updateTarget}\n            onSensorChange={updateSensor}\n            onNoiseChange={updateNoise}\n            onPresetSelect={applyPreset}\n            onReset={resetState}\n          />\n        </div>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction clampCoordinate(impact: Coordinate, target: TargetConfig): Coordinate {\n  return {\n    x: clampNumber(impact.x, -target.width / 2, target.width / 2),\n    y: clampNumber(impact.y, -target.height / 2, target.height / 2),\n  }\n}\n\nfunction clampNumber(value: number, minimum: number, maximum: number): number {\n  return Math.min(Math.max(value, minimum), maximum)\n}\n\nexport default App\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 222,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```

```
}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.css",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.css",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.css",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": ".app-shell {\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.card {\n  background: var(--panel);\n  border: 1px solid var(--border);\n  border-radius: 28px;\n  box-shadow: var(--shadow-soft);\n}\n\n.hero-panel {\n  padding: 2rem;\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  position: relative;\n  overflow: hidden;\n}\n\n.hero-panel::after {\n  content: '';\n  position: absolute;\n  inset: auto -4rem -5rem auto;\n  width: 16rem;\n  height: 16rem;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(220, 93, 55, 0.3), rgba(220, 93, 55, 0));\n  pointer-events: none;\n}\n\n.eyebrow {\n  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.18em;\n  font-size: 0.74rem;\n  color: var(--accent);\n}\n\n.hero-copy,\n.panel-copy {\n  max-width: 64ch;\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n\n.hero-stats {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));\n  gap: 1rem;\n}\n\n.hero-stats div,\n.diagnostic-stats div {\n  padding: 1rem;\n  border-radius: 20px;\n  background: var(--panel-strong);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.12);\n}\n\n.hero-stats span,\n.diagnostic-stats span,\n.trace-row span {\n  display: block;\n  font-size: 0.78rem;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  color: var(--muted);\n  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;\n}\n\n.hero-stats strong,\n.diagnostic-stats strong,\n.trace-row strong {\n  color: var(--ink);\n}\n\n.workspace-grid {\n  display: grid;\n  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.55fr) minmax(22rem, 1fr);\n  gap: 1.5rem;\n}\n\n.workspace-main,\n.workspace-side {\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 1.5rem;\n  align-content: start;\n}\n\n.panel {\n  padding: 1.35rem;\n}\n\n.panel-heading {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  align-items: start;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.panel-heading.compact {\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.target-card {\n  padding: 1.35rem;\n}\n\n.target-svg {\n  width: 100%;\n  aspect-ratio: 1;\n  display: block;\n  cursor: crosshair;\n}\n\n.target-frame {\n  fill: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.72);\n  stroke: rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.12);\n}\n\n.target-plate {\n  fill: rgba(246, 235, 214, 0.95);\n  stroke: rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.4);\n  stroke-width: 2;\n}\n\n.target-axis {\n  stroke: rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.22);\n  stroke-width: 1;\n  stroke-dasharray: 6 6;\n}\n\n.sensor-node {\n  fill: var(--steel);\n  stroke: white;\n  stroke-width: 2;\n}\n\n.sensor-label {\n  fill: var(--ink);\n  font-size: 0.55rem;\n  font-family: var(--font-mono);\n  letter-spacing: 0.06em;\n}\n\n.impact-actual {\n  fill: var(--danger);\n  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);\n  stroke-width: 2;\n}\n\n.impact-estimated-ring {\n  fill: none;\n  stroke: rgba(38, 85, 112, 0.45);\n  stroke-width: 2;\n}\n\n.impact-estimated {\n  fill: var(--steel);\n  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.78);\n  stroke-width: 2;\n}\n\n.impact-connection {\n  stroke: rgba(220, 93, 55, 0.45);\n  stroke-width: 1.5;\n  stroke-dasharray: 3 4;\n}\n\n.legend-row {\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-wrap: wrap;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  color: var(--muted);\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n}\n\n.legend-row span {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.4rem;\n}\n\n.legend-swatch {\n  width: 0.8rem;\n  height: 0.8rem;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  display: inline-block;\n}\n\n.legend-swatch.actual {\n  background: var(--danger);\n}\n\n.legend-swatch.estimated {\n  background: var(--steel);\n}\n\n.legend-swatch.sensor {\n  background: var(--ink);\n}\n\n.table-shell {\n  overflow-x: auto;\n}\n\ntable {\n  width: 100%;\n  border-collapse: collapse;\n  font-size: 0.94rem;\n}\n\nth,\ntd {\n  padding: 0.8rem 0.65rem;\n  text-align: left;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.12);\n}\n\nthead th {\n  font-size: 0.74rem;\n  letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n  text-transform: uppercase;\n  color: var(--muted);\n}\n\n.empty-state {\n  margin: 0;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  background: var(--panel-strong);\n}\n\n.config-actions,\n.config-grid,\n.noise-grid,\n.sensor-stack,\n.diagnostic-stats,\n.trace-list {\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 1rem;\n}\n\n.config-actions {\n  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;\n  align-items: end;\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.config-grid.two-up {\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n  margin-bottom: 1rem;\n}\n\n.config-grid.four-up {\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));\n}\n\n.sensor-editor {\n  padding: 1rem;\n  background: var(--panel-strong);\n  border-radius: 22px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.12);\n}\n\n.sensor-editor__header,\n.confidence-row,\n.trace-row {\n  display: flex;\n  justify-content: space-between;\n  gap: 1rem;\n  align-items: center;\n}\n\n.noise-grid {\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n}\n\n.toggle {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  gap: 0.55rem;\n}\n\n.toggle.wide {\n  grid-column: 1 / -1;\n  font-family: var(--font-display);\n}\n\nlabel,\ninput,\nselect,\nbutton {\n  font: inherit;\n}\n\nlabel {\n  display: grid;\n  gap: 0.45rem;\n  color: var(--ink);\n}\n\ninput,\nselect {\n  width: 100%;\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n  padding: 0.8rem 0.9rem;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  border: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.22);\n  background: rgba(255, 252, 247, 0.94);\n  color: var(--ink);\n}\n\nbutton {\n  padding: 0.8rem 1rem;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  border: 0;\n  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1f495f, #376d88);\n  color: #fff;\n  cursor: pointer;\n}\n\nbutton:hover {\n  filter: brightness(1.05);\n}\n\nbutton:focus-visible,\ninput:focus-visible,\nselect:focus-visible {\n  outline: 2px solid rgba(31, 73, 95, 0.45);\n  outline-offset: 2px;\n}\n\n.validation-box {\n  margin-top: 1rem;\n  padding: 1rem;\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  background: rgba(128, 49, 27, 0.08);\n  border: 1px solid rgba(128, 49, 27, 0.16);\n}\n\n.validation-box.ok {\n  background: rgba(31, 73, 95, 0.08);\n  border-color: rgba(31, 73, 95, 0.16);\n}\n\n.validation-box__title {\n  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;\n  font-family: var(--font-display);\n  color: var(--ink);\n}\n\n.validation-box ul {\n  margin: 0;\n  padding-left: 1.2rem;\n}\n\n.diagnostic-stats {\n  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));\n}\n\n.confidence-row {\n  margin: 1rem 0;\n  padding: 0.8rem 0.95rem;\n  border-radius: 18px;\n  background: var(--panel-strong);\n}\n\n.confidence-pill {\n  display: inline-flex;\n  align-items: center;\n  padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem;\n  border-radius: 999px;\n  font-size: 0.85rem;\n  text-transform: capitalize;\n}\n\n.confidence-pill.high {\n  background: rgba(66, 122, 78, 0.12);\n  color: #2e5e36;\n}\n\n.confidence-pill.medium {\n  background: rgba(185, 128, 34, 0.15);\n  color: #7a5513;\n}\n\n.confidence-pill.low {\n  background: rgba(128, 49, 27, 0.12);\n  color: #7a2d19;\n}\n\n.trace-list {\n  border-top: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.12);\n  padding-top: 1rem;\n}\n\n.trace-row {\n  padding-bottom: 0.85rem;\n  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.08);\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 1100px) {\n  .workspace-grid {\n    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n  }\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 720px) {\n  .hero-panel,\n  .panel,\n  .target-card {\n    padding: 1rem;\n  }\n\n  .hero-stats,\n  .config-grid.two-up,\n  .config-grid.four-up,\n  .noise-grid,\n  .diagnostic-stats,\n  .config-actions {\n    grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n  }\n\n  .panel-heading,\n  .sensor-editor__header,\n  .confidence-row,\n  .trace-row {\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: start;\n  }\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 437,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}
```

```
  "kind": "codeblockUri",
  "uri": {

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/index.css",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/index.css",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/index.css",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');\n\n:root {\n  --paper: #f5ecdd;\n  --paper-deep: #ead8b8;\n  --panel: rgba(255, 250, 242, 0.82);\n  --panel-strong: rgba(252, 244, 232, 0.98);\n  --ink: #221a14;\n  --muted: #6c533a;\n  --border: rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.18);\n  --accent: #b14528;\n  --steel: #265570;\n  --danger: #dc5d37;\n  --shadow-soft: 0 24px 60px rgba(61, 34, 14, 0.14);\n  --font-display: 'Space Grotesk', 'Avenir Next', sans-serif;\n  --font-body: 'Space Grotesk', 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;\n  --font-mono: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'SFMono-Regular', monospace;\n  color: var(--ink);\n  background: var(--paper);\n  font: 16px/1.5 var(--font-body);\n  font-synthesis: none;\n  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;\n  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;\n}\n\n* {\n  box-sizing: border-box;\n}\n\nhtml {\n  scroll-behavior: smooth;\n}\n\nbody {\n  margin: 0;\n  min-width: 320px;\n  background:\n    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(177, 69, 40, 0.12), transparent 26%),\n    radial-gradient(circle at left center, rgba(38, 85, 112, 0.12), transparent 28%),\n    linear-gradient(180deg, #f8f1e5 0%, #f1e5d1 100%);\n}\n\nbody::before {\n  content: '';\n  position: fixed;\n  inset: 0;\n  background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 1px, transparent 1px),\n    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14) 1px, transparent 1px);\n  background-size: 40px 40px;\n  pointer-events: none;\n  mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at center, black, transparent 82%);\n}\n\n#root {\n  width: min(1380px, calc(100% - 2rem));\n  margin: 0 auto;\n  min-height: 100svh;\n  padding: 1.25rem 0 2rem;\n  position: relative;\n}\n\nh1,\nh2,\nh3 {\n  margin: 0;\n  font-family: var(--font-display);\n  line-height: 1.02;\n  color: var(--ink);\n}\n\nh1 {\n  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5.2rem);\n  max-width: 12ch;\n}\n\nh2 {\n  font-size: 1.5rem;\n}\n\nh3 {\n  font-size: 1rem;\n}\n\np {\n  margin: 0;\n}\n\na {\n  color: inherit;\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 93,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      },
      {
        "text": "",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 93,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 113,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}
```

```
  },

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { MouseEvent } from 'react'\nimport type { Coordinate, SensorConfig, TargetConfig } from '../types/simulation'\n\ntype TargetCanvasProps = {\n  target: TargetConfig\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]\n  actualImpact: Coordinate\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate | null\n  onImpactSelect: (impact: Coordinate) => void\n}\n\nconst VIEWBOX_SIZE = 240\nconst MARGIN = 18\n\nexport function TargetCanvas({\n  target,\n  sensors,\n  actualImpact,\n  estimatedImpact,\n  onImpactSelect,\n}: TargetCanvasProps) {\n  const scaleX = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - MARGIN * 2) / target.width\n  const scaleY = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - MARGIN * 2) / target.height\n  const scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY)\n  const viewWidth = target.width * scale\n  const viewHeight = target.height * scale\n  const left = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - viewWidth) / 2\n  const top = (VIEWBOX_SIZE - viewHeight) / 2\n\n  function toSvgPoint(point: Coordinate) {\n    return {\n      x: left + (point.x + target.width / 2) * scale,\n      y: top + (target.height / 2 - point.y) * scale,\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleClick(event: MouseEvent<SVGSVGElement>) {\n    const bounds = event.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect()\n    const svgX = ((event.clientX - bounds.left) / bounds.width) * VIEWBOX_SIZE\n    const svgY = ((event.clientY - bounds.top) / bounds.height) * VIEWBOX_SIZE\n\n    if (\n      svgX < left ||\n      svgX > left + viewWidth ||\n      svgY < top ||\n      svgY > top + viewHeight\n    ) {\n      return\n    }\n\n    const x = (svgX - left) / scale - target.width / 2\n    const y = target.height / 2 - (svgY - top) / scale\n    onImpactSelect({ x, y })\n  }\n\n  const actualPoint = toSvgPoint(actualImpact)\n  const estimatedPoint = estimatedImpact ? toSvgPoint(estimatedImpact) : null\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"target-card\">\n      <div className=\"panel-heading\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Target View</p>\n          <h2>{target.label}</h2>\n        </div>\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">Click anywhere on the plate to generate the true impact location.</p>\n      </div>\n      <svg\n        className=\"target-svg\"\n        viewBox={`0 0 ${VIEWBOX_SIZE} ${VIEWBOX_SIZE}`}\n        onClick={handleClick}\n        role=\"img\"\n        aria-label=\"Interactive target surface\"\n      >\n        <defs>\n          <pattern id=\"target-grid\" width=\"24\" height=\"24\" patternUnits=\"userSpaceOnUse\">\n            <path d=\"M 24 0 L 0 0 0 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"rgba(108, 83, 58, 0.16)\" strokeWidth=\"1\" />\n          </pattern>\n        </defs>\n        <rect x=\"0\" y=\"0\" width={VIEWBOX_SIZE} height={VIEWBOX_SIZE} rx=\"24\" className=\"target-frame\" />\n        <rect\n          x={left}\n          y={top}\n          width={viewWidth}\n          height={viewHeight}\n          rx=\"20\"\n          className=\"target-plate\"\n        />\n        <rect\n          x={left}\n          y={top}\n          width={viewWidth}\n          height={viewHeight}\n          rx=\"20\"\n          fill=\"url(#target-grid)\"\n          pointerEvents=\"none\"\n        />\n        <line x1={left} x2={left + viewWidth} y1={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} y2={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} className=\"target-axis\" />\n        <line y1={top} y2={top + viewHeight} x1={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} x2={VIEWBOX_SIZE / 2} className=\"target-axis\" />\n        {sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled).map((sensor) => {\n          const sensorPoint = toSvgPoint({ x: sensor.x, y: sensor.y })\n          return (\n            <g key={sensor.id}>\n              <circle cx={sensorPoint.x} cy={sensorPoint.y} r=\"7\" className=\"sensor-node\" />\n              <text x={sensorPoint.x + 10} y={sensorPoint.y - 10} className=\"sensor-label\">\n                {sensor.label}\n              </text>\n            </g>\n          )\n        })}\n        <circle cx={actualPoint.x} cy={actualPoint.y} r=\"6\" className=\"impact-actual\" />\n        {estimatedPoint ? (\n          <>\n            <circle cx={estimatedPoint.x} cy={estimatedPoint.y} r=\"9\" className=\"impact-estimated-ring\" />\n            <circle cx={estimatedPoint.x} cy={estimatedPoint.y} r=\"5\" className=\"impact-estimated\" />\n            <line\n              x1={actualPoint.x}\n              y1={actualPoint.y}\n              x2={estimatedPoint.x}\n              y2={estimatedPoint.y}\n              className=\"impact-connection\"\n            />\n          </>\n        ) : null}\n      </svg>\n      <div className=\"legend-row\">\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch actual\"></i> True impact</span>\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch estimated\"></i> Estimated impact</span>\n        <span><i className=\"legend-swatch sensor\"></i> Active sensor</span>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 135,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```

```
  "id": "9ded614e-6c11-4ea4-889a-6ac5110a2731",

}

{
  "kind": "codeblockUri",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",

}

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/SensorPanel.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { SensorMeasurement } from '../types/simulation'\n\ntype SensorPanelProps = {\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]\n}\n\nexport function SensorPanel({ measurements }: SensorPanelProps) {\n  if (measurements.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      <section className=\"panel card sensor-panel\">\n        <div className=\"panel-heading compact\">\n          <div>\n            <p className=\"eyebrow\">Sensor Readout</p>\n            <h2>Arrival timing</h2>\n          </div>\n          <p className=\"panel-copy\">Enable sensors to generate timing data.</p>\n        </div>\n        <p className=\"empty-state\">No active sensor measurements are available yet.</p>\n      </section>\n    )\n  }\n\n  const reference = [...measurements].sort(\n    (left, right) => left.noisyTimeSeconds - right.noisyTimeSeconds,\n  )[0]\n\n  return (\n    <section className=\"panel card sensor-panel\">\n      <div className=\"panel-heading compact\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Sensor Readout</p>\n          <h2>Arrival timing</h2>\n        </div>\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">Distances, ideal arrivals, noisy arrivals, and TDOA deltas update on every click.</p>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"table-shell\">\n        <table>\n          <thead>\n            <tr>\n              <th>Sensor</th>\n              <th>Distance</th>\n              <th>Ideal</th>\n              <th>Noisy</th>\n              <th>Delta</th>\n              <th>TDOA vs ref</th>\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {measurements.map((measurement) => {\n              const tdoaMicros =\n                (measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - reference.noisyTimeSeconds) * 1_000_000\n\n              return (\n                <tr key={measurement.sensorId}>\n                  <td>{measurement.label}</td>\n                  <td>{measurement.distance.toFixed(2)}</td>\n                  <td>{measurement.idealTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s</td>\n                  <td>{measurement.noisyTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s</td>\n                  <td>{measurement.deltaMicros.toFixed(2)} us</td>\n                  <td>{tdoaMicros.toFixed(2)} us</td>\n                </tr>\n              )\n            })}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n    </section>\n  )\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```

```
  "kind": "codeblockUri",

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/DiagnosticsPanel.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/DiagnosticsPanel.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/components/DiagnosticsPanel.tsx",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import type { Coordinate, SolverResult } from '../types/simulation'\n\ntype DiagnosticsPanelProps = {\n  actualImpact: Coordinate\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate | null\n  missDistance: number\n  speedOfSound: number\n  activeSensorCount: number\n  solver: SolverResult\n  units: string\n}\n\nexport function DiagnosticsPanel({\n  actualImpact,\n  estimatedImpact,\n  missDistance,\n  speedOfSound,\n  activeSensorCount,\n  solver,\n  units,\n}: DiagnosticsPanelProps) {\n  return (\n    <section className=\"panel card diagnostics-panel\">\n      <div className=\"panel-heading compact\">\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Diagnostics</p>\n          <h2>Solver quality</h2>\n        </div>\n        <p className=\"panel-copy\">This panel exposes the reconstructed point, residuals, and the current confidence band.</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"diagnostic-stats\">\n        <div>\n          <span>True impact</span>\n          <strong>\n            {actualImpact.x.toFixed(2)}, {actualImpact.y.toFixed(2)}\n          </strong>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <span>Estimated impact</span>\n          <strong>\n            {estimatedImpact\n              ? `${estimatedImpact.x.toFixed(2)}, ${estimatedImpact.y.toFixed(2)}`\n              : 'Unavailable'}\n          </strong>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <span>Miss distance</span>\n          <strong>\n            {Number.isFinite(missDistance) ? `${missDistance.toFixed(2)} ${units}` : 'n/a'}\n          </strong>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <span>Residual RMS</span>\n          <strong>\n            {Number.isFinite(solver.residualMicros)\n              ? `${solver.residualMicros.toFixed(2)} us`\n              : 'n/a'}\n          </strong>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <span>Speed of sound</span>\n          <strong>{speedOfSound.toFixed(2)} m/s</strong>\n        </div>\n        <div>\n          <span>Active sensors</span>\n          <strong>{activeSensorCount}</strong>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"confidence-row\">\n        <span className={`confidence-pill ${solver.confidence}`}>\n          {solver.confidence} confidence\n        </span>\n        <span>{solver.converged ? `Solved in ${solver.iterations} iterations` : 'Solver did not fully converge'}</span>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"trace-list\">\n        {solver.trace.map((entry) => (\n          <div key={`${entry.label}-${entry.value}`} className=\"trace-row\">\n            <span>{entry.label}</span>\n            <strong>{entry.value}</strong>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n    </section>\n  )\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 90,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```


**Installing and checking compatibility**

I need to install vitest, which means I'll run npm install after I edit the package.json. Next, I should consider whether the onTargetChange prop signature in App.tsx needs a generic type to ensure compatibility. It seems like updateTarget(field: keyof Pick<...>) is likely the same type as union. Now, I should check for any errors. Maybe I'll use get_errors to batch them together and see what's going on.

**Testing and building process**

I need to run some tests and possibly build, maybe even lint the code too. It seems like getting dev server output might not be necessary right now. I should run `npm test` and the build, and I'm thinking about linting as well. Could I run the tests and build in parallel? That might work if they don't interfere with each other. I guess I should also run `eslint`. A clear preamble would help too.

\u001b[34mexpect\u001b[0m(result\u001b[33m.\u001b[0mestimatedImpact\u001b[33m?.\u001b[0mx)\u001b[33m.\u001b[34mtoBeCloseTo\u001b[0m(state\u001b[33m.\u001b[0mimpact\u001b[33m.\u001b[0mx\u001b[33m,\u001b[0m **Troubleshooting convergence issues**

I need to fix the solver test since it may have converged incorrectly because the step threshold wasn't reached, but the estimate looks okay. I could inspect the actual results by running the test or checking the node directly. It seems easier to run a specific test using `npx vitest`, especially with a verbose reporter. But I'm running into issues with importing TypeScript in node, which adds to the complexity. I might have to get the solver to account for the residual threshold in convergence as well.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "xJg0oF6JPiUzON22mUeO2ZRPV7oFzi44Fx/WxRY11WrfWwtTqF1t04ioeYgpoiAF0Qi9DuZWnXMLNs2UF0RHJs/i5wBvCEIbs3LPaD3suUZdRUw3kJ0zHr3WAC9tv46ID0pT6OrBC9LhlIPZ9b7/HyzeR8B4Wzj0yABi3Tpmj85tM4njQFJRFXDlJVyhQi7TMewZBlLQnacF5kqXrJIdmdBdCzVjuaaoJLWhVI2IWT63csixt6L4OSU34yn6q/3cy7K7P2bkQu0mH2bcx8av+da5OeKVyb2jmzEVBMlCMC0FUDLoXkCNc/ORnc0UKWnyrqCG0Odb0FaMivoOTM77FCMwLNBhqWYRkBBJ3YJPVW2rlrnDuMzS79EgcRRAGQl5XgZGP2Qzid1k9WGuNFi1Zg=="
}

**Refining convergence criteria**

I can compute the residual at each iteration and mark it as converged if it falls below a tiny threshold. I’m considering that if the final result's residual is very small, I should set converged to true. It seems possible the initial guess is close to perfect, but if the step threshold isn't under 0.001, it might get stuck. I need to ensure that if residual is less than or equal to 0.5 after the final computation, it’s marked as converged. I’ll patch the `tdoa.ts` file accordingly!

{

  "metadata": {

    "stopReason": "text"
  }
}

The only failing check is the solver convergence flag on perfect data. The estimate is likely landing correctly, so I’m tightening the convergence criterion to treat a near-zero residual as a successful solve instead of requiring only a tiny final step.

```
  "kind": "codeblockUri",

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { clampImpact, computeDistance } from '../geometry'\nimport type {\n  Coordinate,\n  SensorConfig,\n  SensorMeasurement,\n  SolverResult,\n  TargetConfig,\n  TraceEntry,\n} from '../../types/simulation'\n\ntype SolverInput = {\n  target: TargetConfig\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]\n  speedOfSound: number\n}\n\nconst MAX_ITERATIONS = 16\nconst EPSILON = 1e-6\n\nexport function solveTdoa(input: SolverInput): SolverResult {\n  const activeSensors = input.sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)\n\n  if (activeSensors.length < 3 || input.measurements.length < 3) {\n    return buildFailure('Need at least 3 active sensors to solve.', 0)\n  }\n\n  const measurementsById = new Map(\n    input.measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),\n  )\n  const referenceMeasurement = [...input.measurements].sort(\n    (left, right) => left.noisyTimeSeconds - right.noisyTimeSeconds,\n  )[0]\n  const referenceSensor = activeSensors.find(\n    (sensor) => sensor.id === referenceMeasurement.sensorId,\n  )\n\n  if (!referenceSensor) {\n    return buildFailure('Reference sensor missing from configuration.', 0)\n  }\n\n  const trace: TraceEntry[] = [\n    {\n      label: 'Reference sensor',\n      value: `${referenceSensor.label} (${referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s)`,\n    },\n  ]\n\n  let estimate = clampImpact(getInitialGuess(activeSensors, input.measurements), input.target)\n  let converged = false\n  let iterations = 0\n\n  for (let iteration = 0; iteration < MAX_ITERATIONS; iteration += 1) {\n    iterations = iteration + 1\n\n    const refDistance = computeDistance(estimate, referenceSensor)\n    const refTime = referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds\n    const jacobianRows: Array<{ dx: number; dy: number; residual: number }> = []\n\n    for (const sensor of activeSensors) {\n      if (sensor.id === referenceSensor.id) {\n        continue\n      }\n\n      const measurement = measurementsById.get(sensor.id)\n      if (!measurement) {\n        continue\n      }\n\n      const sensorDistance = computeDistance(estimate, sensor)\n      const predictedDelta = (sensorDistance - refDistance) / input.speedOfSound\n      const measuredDelta = measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - refTime\n      const residual = predictedDelta - measuredDelta\n      const dx =\n        (estimate.x - sensor.x) / (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(sensorDistance, EPSILON)) -\n        (estimate.x - referenceSensor.x) /\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(refDistance, EPSILON))\n      const dy =\n        (estimate.y - sensor.y) / (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(sensorDistance, EPSILON)) -\n        (estimate.y - referenceSensor.y) /\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(refDistance, EPSILON))\n\n      jacobianRows.push({ dx, dy, residual })\n    }\n\n    if (jacobianRows.length < 2) {\n      return buildFailure('Insufficient TDOA pairs for solving.', iterations)\n    }\n\n    let a11 = 0\n    let a12 = 0\n    let a22 = 0\n    let b1 = 0\n    let b2 = 0\n\n    for (const row of jacobianRows) {\n      a11 += row.dx * row.dx\n      a12 += row.dx * row.dy\n      a22 += row.dy * row.dy\n      b1 += row.dx * row.residual\n      b2 += row.dy * row.residual\n    }\n\n    const determinant = a11 * a22 - a12 * a12\n    if (Math.abs(determinant) < EPSILON) {\n      trace.push({\n        label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,\n        value: 'Degenerate geometry prevented a stable solve.',\n      })\n      break\n    }\n\n    const stepX = (-a22 * b1 + a12 * b2) / determinant\n    const stepY = (a12 * b1 - a11 * b2) / determinant\n\n    estimate = clampImpact(\n      {\n        x: estimate.x + stepX,\n        y: estimate.y + stepY,\n      },\n      input.target,\n    )\n\n    trace.push({\n      label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,\n      value: `dx ${stepX.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}, dy ${stepY.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}`,\n    })\n\n    if (Math.sqrt(stepX * stepX + stepY * stepY) < 0.001) {\n      converged = true\n      break\n    }\n  }\n\n  const residualMicros = computeResidualMicros(\n    estimate,\n    activeSensors,\n    input.measurements,\n    referenceSensor,\n    referenceMeasurement,\n    input.speedOfSound,\n  )\n  if (Number.isFinite(residualMicros) && residualMicros <= 0.5) {\n    converged = true\n  }\n\n  trace.push({\n    label: 'Estimated impact',\n    value: `${estimate.x.toFixed(2)}, ${estimate.y.toFixed(2)} ${input.target.units}`,\n  })\n  trace.push({\n    label: 'Residual',\n    value: `${residualMicros.toFixed(2)} microseconds RMS`,\n  })\n\n  return {\n    estimatedImpact: estimate,\n    converged,\n    iterations,\n    residualMicros,\n    confidence: getConfidence(residualMicros, converged),\n    trace,\n  }\n}\n\nfunction computeResidualMicros(\n  estimate: Coordinate,\n  activeSensors: SensorConfig[],\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],\n  referenceSensor: SensorConfig,\n  referenceMeasurement: SensorMeasurement,\n  speedOfSound: number,\n): number {\n  const measurementMap = new Map(\n    measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),\n  )\n  const refDistance = computeDistance(estimate, referenceSensor)\n  const refTime = referenceMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds\n  let sum = 0\n  let count = 0\n\n  for (const sensor of activeSensors) {\n    if (sensor.id === referenceSensor.id) {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const measurement = measurementMap.get(sensor.id)\n    if (!measurement) {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const distance = computeDistance(estimate, sensor)\n    const predictedDelta = (distance - refDistance) / speedOfSound\n    const measuredDelta = measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - refTime\n    const residual = (predictedDelta - measuredDelta) * 1_000_000\n    sum += residual * residual\n    count += 1\n  }\n\n  return count > 0 ? Math.sqrt(sum / count) : Number.NaN\n}\n\nfunction getInitialGuess(\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],\n): Coordinate {\n  const measurementMap = new Map(\n    measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),\n  )\n\n  let totalWeight = 0\n  let x = 0\n  let y = 0\n\n  for (const sensor of sensors) {\n    const measurement = measurementMap.get(sensor.id)\n    if (!measurement) {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const weight = 1 / Math.max(measurement.noisyTimeSeconds, EPSILON)\n    totalWeight += weight\n    x += sensor.x * weight\n    y += sensor.y * weight\n  }\n\n  if (totalWeight === 0) {\n    return { x: 0, y: 0 }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    x: x / totalWeight,\n    y: y / totalWeight,\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getConfidence(residualMicros: number, converged: boolean) {\n  if (!converged || Number.isNaN(residualMicros)) {\n    return 'low' as const\n  }\n\n  if (residualMicros <= 10) {\n    return 'high' as const\n  }\n\n  if (residualMicros <= 40) {\n    return 'medium' as const\n  }\n\n  return 'low' as const\n}\n\nfunction buildFailure(message: string, iterations: number): SolverResult {\n  return {\n    estimatedImpact: null,\n    converged: false,\n    iterations,\n    residualMicros: Number.NaN,\n    confidence: 'low',\n    trace: [{ label: 'Solver', value: message }],\n  }\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 264,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```


**Running tests and building**

Okay, I’m thinking about running the tests again, and maybe I should do a build too. I’ve only changed a TypeScript file, and there are no errors, so it’s likely unnecessary to check for errors after that. Still, using the get_errors function might be recommended after making edits. So, I guess I’ll get the errors file and then rerun the tests and build. Let’s see how it goes!

**Exploring TypeScript imports**

I'm considering whether I can import a source with TypeScript, and it seems like Node might not understand it directly. Using a dynamic import for a compiled asset doesn't feel practical. I could potentially run `npm exec tsx --eval "..."` since tsx can handle TypeScript imports. Maybe I should look into ephemeral installs to grab packages from npm. Now, I just need to decide on the right command to move forward.

The first debug command got mangled by npm argument parsing. I’m rerunning it with the simpler `npx tsx -e` form so I can inspect the raw solver output.

**Refining geometric solutions**

I’m grappling with issues of degenerate geometry due to my initial guess causing singularity. I think I need a better solver, perhaps deriving a more analytical estimate from linearized equations. Using multilateration through least squares with time of arrival (TOA) could help, but I have to think about the nature of absolute versus relative arrival times in simulations. Introducing an unknown offset alongside positional unknowns might work, maintaining the robustness of the Gauss-Newton method. It’s important that I refactor my approach with these overdetermined systems.

{
  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",
  "id": "RlREN44vTriI0/RGzDfAkzAspppyUliLYP5MS7+2YZaAA+XK4RUyF0P5mqRmJDGVz0iiFnbkKOOmIYokdM9Ohu4Vpt4fAu4XToNe1PWi+34A0E8q0AUMj+N7QJH96Yw15pVg3zBVgdecluKbn7UjJEfR8fjyTzSzzZBzLUAYk2vIzUB/XYyfyzDlwfnWNElL3HLMSKEGr41+vD6Tf4ZP7t6sY8Ru/UioW3TWq4nUC0ZKz6lKUAXMwXGCUqShSCgHne8dNy3S0rCrpehdRpT65Awe0Gh2EgteqBOVaUbm+SQ+WACdZdIYctKIlLqnCOonHNRfVdq+NP6kymI4r7sKmCrjfrqUTn0qzunBkrrXrUbJGdJc1tNX+Bq9sjozBYOkDJDz3NtMvxPlzSQ/ad+j8w=="
}

**Implementing an initial guess**

I need to create an initial guess for x and y, perhaps using a weighted centroid, and set t0 as minTime minus minDistance divided by speed. It might be helpful to use a centroid of zero. I plan to manually implement a 3x3 solver and trace the updates. Patching tdoa.ts seems significant; maybe it's better to replace the file with a complete update. I want to ensure there are no errors, and I’ll define an algorithm to filter active sensors and their measurements adequately. If I have fewer than three, I'll account for failure.

  "kind": "thinking",
  "value": "",

}

**Calculating and patching data**

I’m looking at how to calculate micros as the RMS of residual times one million. The trace includes the first arrival, and I might need to consider step sizes and confidence thresholds. This isn’t precisely TDOA, but I think it’s a good equivalent after correcting for offset. I also want to rename the reference trace to "earliest arrival." Now, it seems like I should patch the whole file with these updates!

The solver issue is structural rather than just the convergence flag. I’m replacing the reference-sensor formulation with a more stable solve over

, and an unknown global time offset, which still handles TDOA-style data but avoids the degenerate first-step case.

```
  "kind": "codeblockUri",
```
