```
{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "import { clampImpact, computeDistance } from '../geometry'\nimport type {\n  Coordinate,\n  SensorConfig,\n  SensorMeasurement,\n  SolverResult,\n  TargetConfig,\n  TraceEntry,\n} from '../../types/simulation'\n\ntype SolverInput = {\n  target: TargetConfig\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[]\n  speedOfSound: number\n}\n\nconst MAX_ITERATIONS = 16\nconst EPSILON = 1e-6\n\nexport function solveTdoa(input: SolverInput): SolverResult {\n  const activeSensors = input.sensors.filter((sensor) => sensor.enabled)\n\n  if (activeSensors.length < 3 || input.measurements.length < 3) {\n    return buildFailure('Need at least 3 active sensors to solve.', 0)\n  }\n\n  const measurementsById = new Map(\n    input.measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),\n  )\n  const sensorData = activeSensors\n    .map((sensor) => ({\n      sensor,\n      measurement: measurementsById.get(sensor.id),\n    }))\n    .filter(\n      (\n        entry,\n      ): entry is { sensor: SensorConfig; measurement: SensorMeasurement } =>\n        Boolean(entry.measurement),\n    )\n\n  if (sensorData.length < 3) {\n    return buildFailure('Missing measurements for active sensors.', 0)\n  }\n\n  const earliestMeasurement = [...input.measurements].sort(\n    (left, right) => left.noisyTimeSeconds - right.noisyTimeSeconds,\n  )[0]\n\n  const trace: TraceEntry[] = [\n    {\n      label: 'Earliest arrival',\n      value: `${earliestMeasurement.label} (${earliestMeasurement.noisyTimeSeconds.toFixed(6)} s)`,\n    },\n  ]\n\n  let estimate = clampImpact(getInitialGuess(activeSensors, input.measurements), input.target)\n  let timeOffset = getInitialOffset(estimate, sensorData, input.speedOfSound)\n  let converged = false\n  let iterations = 0\n\n  for (let iteration = 0; iteration < MAX_ITERATIONS; iteration += 1) {\n    iterations = iteration + 1\n\n    const normalMatrix = [\n      [0, 0, 0],\n      [0, 0, 0],\n      [0, 0, 0],\n    ]\n    const normalVector = [0, 0, 0]\n\n    for (const entry of sensorData) {\n      const distance = computeDistance(estimate, entry.sensor)\n      const predictedTime = distance / input.speedOfSound + timeOffset\n      const residual = predictedTime - entry.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds\n      const row = [\n        (estimate.x - entry.sensor.x) /\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(distance, EPSILON)),\n        (estimate.y - entry.sensor.y) /\n          (input.speedOfSound * Math.max(distance, EPSILON)),\n        1,\n      ]\n\n      for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < 3; rowIndex += 1) {\n        normalVector[rowIndex] += row[rowIndex] * residual\n        for (let columnIndex = 0; columnIndex < 3; columnIndex += 1) {\n          normalMatrix[rowIndex][columnIndex] += row[rowIndex] * row[columnIndex]\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    const solution = solveLinear3x3(normalMatrix, [\n      -normalVector[0],\n      -normalVector[1],\n      -normalVector[2],\n    ])\n\n    if (!solution) {\n      trace.push({\n        label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,\n        value: 'Degenerate geometry prevented a stable solve.',\n      })\n      break\n    }\n\n    const [stepX, stepY, stepOffset] = solution\n\n    estimate = clampImpact(\n      {\n        x: estimate.x + stepX,\n        y: estimate.y + stepY,\n      },\n      input.target,\n    )\n    timeOffset += stepOffset\n\n    trace.push({\n      label: `Iteration ${iterations}`,\n      value: `dx ${stepX.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}, dy ${stepY.toFixed(3)} ${input.target.units}, dt ${(stepOffset * 1_000_000).toFixed(2)} us`,\n    })\n\n    if (\n      Math.sqrt(stepX * stepX + stepY * stepY) < 0.001 &&\n      Math.abs(stepOffset) < 1e-7\n    ) {\n      converged = true\n      break\n    }\n  }\n\n  const residualMicros = computeResidualMicros(estimate, sensorData, timeOffset, input.speedOfSound)\n  if (Number.isFinite(residualMicros) && residualMicros <= 0.5) {\n    converged = true\n  }\n\n  trace.push({\n    label: 'Estimated impact',\n    value: `${estimate.x.toFixed(2)}, ${estimate.y.toFixed(2)} ${input.target.units}`,\n  })\n  trace.push({\n    label: 'Residual',\n    value: `${residualMicros.toFixed(2)} microseconds RMS`,\n  })\n\n  return {\n    estimatedImpact: estimate,\n    converged,\n    iterations,\n    residualMicros,\n    confidence: getConfidence(residualMicros, converged),\n    trace,\n  }\n}\n\nfunction computeResidualMicros(\n  estimate: Coordinate,\n  sensorData: Array<{ sensor: SensorConfig; measurement: SensorMeasurement }>,\n  timeOffset: number,\n  speedOfSound: number,\n): number {\n  let sum = 0\n  let count = 0\n\n  for (const entry of sensorData) {\n    const distance = computeDistance(estimate, entry.sensor)\n    const predictedTime = distance / speedOfSound + timeOffset\n    const residual = (predictedTime - entry.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds) * 1_000_000\n    sum += residual * residual\n    count += 1\n  }\n\n  return count > 0 ? Math.sqrt(sum / count) : Number.NaN\n}\n\nfunction getInitialGuess(\n  sensors: SensorConfig[],\n  measurements: SensorMeasurement[],\n): Coordinate {\n  const measurementMap = new Map(\n    measurements.map((measurement) => [measurement.sensorId, measurement]),\n  )\n\n  let totalWeight = 0\n  let x = 0\n  let y = 0\n\n  for (const sensor of sensors) {\n    const measurement = measurementMap.get(sensor.id)\n    if (!measurement) {\n      continue\n    }\n\n    const weight = 1 / Math.max(measurement.noisyTimeSeconds, EPSILON)\n    totalWeight += weight\n    x += sensor.x * weight\n    y += sensor.y * weight\n  }\n\n  if (totalWeight === 0) {\n    return { x: 0, y: 0 }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    x: x / totalWeight,\n    y: y / totalWeight,\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getInitialOffset(\n  estimate: Coordinate,\n  sensorData: Array<{ sensor: SensorConfig; measurement: SensorMeasurement }>,\n  speedOfSound: number,\n): number {\n  let sum = 0\n\n  for (const entry of sensorData) {\n    sum += entry.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds - computeDistance(estimate, entry.sensor) / speedOfSound\n  }\n\n  return sum / sensorData.length\n}\n\nfunction solveLinear3x3(\n  matrix: number[][],\n  vector: number[],\n): [number, number, number] | null {\n  const augmented = matrix.map((row, index) => [...row, vector[index]])\n\n  for (let pivotIndex = 0; pivotIndex < 3; pivotIndex += 1) {\n    let maxRowIndex = pivotIndex\n    for (let rowIndex = pivotIndex + 1; rowIndex < 3; rowIndex += 1) {\n      if (\n        Math.abs(augmented[rowIndex][pivotIndex]) >\n        Math.abs(augmented[maxRowIndex][pivotIndex])\n      ) {\n        maxRowIndex = rowIndex\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (Math.abs(augmented[maxRowIndex][pivotIndex]) < EPSILON) {\n      return null\n    }\n\n    if (maxRowIndex !== pivotIndex) {\n      const temporary = augmented[pivotIndex]\n      augmented[pivotIndex] = augmented[maxRowIndex]\n      augmented[maxRowIndex] = temporary\n    }\n\n    const pivot = augmented[pivotIndex][pivotIndex]\n    for (let columnIndex = pivotIndex; columnIndex < 4; columnIndex += 1) {\n      augmented[pivotIndex][columnIndex] /= pivot\n    }\n\n    for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < 3; rowIndex += 1) {\n      if (rowIndex === pivotIndex) {\n        continue\n      }\n\n      const factor = augmented[rowIndex][pivotIndex]\n      for (let columnIndex = pivotIndex; columnIndex < 4; columnIndex += 1) {\n        augmented[rowIndex][columnIndex] -= factor * augmented[pivotIndex][columnIndex]\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return [augmented[0][3], augmented[1][3], augmented[2][3]]\n}\n\nfunction getConfidence(residualMicros: number, converged: boolean) {\n  if (!converged || Number.isNaN(residualMicros)) {\n    return 'low' as const\n  }\n\n  if (residualMicros <= 10) {\n    return 'high' as const\n  }\n\n  if (residualMicros <= 40) {\n    return 'medium' as const\n  }\n\n  return 'low' as const\n}\n\nfunction buildFailure(message: string, iterations: number): SolverResult {\n  return {\n    estimatedImpact: null,\n    converged: false,\n    iterations,\n    residualMicros: Number.NaN,\n    confidence: 'low',\n    trace: [{ label: 'Solver', value: message }],\n  }\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 298,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}


```


**Running checks for errors**

I need to ensure there are no errors. So, I’m planning to run a check for errors and tests, and maybe do a build as well to make sure everything is working smoothly. I should also consider linting to catch any potential issues in the code. I'll focus on any changes in the file to see if that affects anything. Getting this right is important for smooth functionality!

```
  "kind": "codeblockUri",

{
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/README.md",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/README.md",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/README.md",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "# Bullet Impact Simulator\n\nInteractive web app for simulating where a bullet hit a rectangular target using acoustic arrival times from sensors mounted behind the target.\n\n## Current MVP\n\n- Click on the target to define the true impact point.\n- Configure target width and height.\n- Configure three active sensors and optionally enable a fourth sensor.\n- Model sensor depth, per-sensor timing bias, clock drift, timing jitter, and speed-of-sound variation.\n- Display per-sensor distance, ideal arrival time, noisy arrival time, and TDOA deltas.\n- Reconstruct the impact point with a browser-side solver and show miss distance, residuals, and confidence.\n- Persist the last-used state in local storage.\n\n## Stack\n\n- React 19\n- TypeScript\n- Vite\n- Vitest\n- Static deployment via Netlify\n\n## Development\n\n```bash\nnpm install\nnpm run dev\n```\n\n## Quality Checks\n\n```bash\nnpm test\nnpm run lint\nnpm run build\n```\n\n## Deployment\n\nNetlify can deploy this as a static site using the included `netlify.toml`.\n\n- Build command: `npm run build`\n- Publish directory: `dist`\n\n## Project Structure\n\n- `src/App.tsx`: top-level simulator composition\n- `src/components`: target view, configuration controls, diagnostics, and sensor readout\n- `src/lib/geometry.ts`: deterministic arrival-time math\n- `src/lib/noise.ts`: timing perturbation layer\n- `src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts`: impact reconstruction solver\n- `src/lib/__tests__`: math and solver tests\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      },
      {
        "text": "",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true
}
```

**Running lint and builds**

I need to run lint again since the solver changed after the last lint. Just to be safe, I’m wondering if I should also build, even though I did that after the solver. I think running lint should be the priority right now, and maybe I can also check for any changed files. It might be a good idea to manage my todo list and get everything completed after finishing lint.

Implemented the first working slice of the bullet impact simulator: React/Vite app scaffold, target click simulation, sensor/noise configuration, browser-side solver, persisted presets, tests, lint-clean state, and Netlify-ready build setup.

{
  "kind": "toolInvocationSerialized",
  "presentation": "hidden",
  "invocationMessage": "",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },

  "toolCallId": "call_9ooDMIhEgR9dy6XVid2nW9mZ",
  "toolId": "task_complete"
}

Implemented the first working MVP. The app now lets you click a target to simulate the true hit point, computes ideal and noisy arrival times for configurable sensors behind the target, reconstructs the impact point in the browser, and shows the calculation outputs in side panels. The main integration lives in

. Verification is clean: `npm test`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` all pass. The dev server is already running locally at `http://localhost:5173`.

Natural next steps are:
1. Add a visual comparison mode between 3-sensor and 4-sensor solutions.
2. Expose more of the solver math graphically, such as hyperbola or residual overlays.
3. Define the input contract for future real sensor ingestion so the simulator and hardware path share the same solver entry point.
assistant
I’m starting the implementation by checking the workspace state and loading the saved plan so I can scaffold the app and wire the core simulation modules in the right order.
assistant
The repo is still clean enough to scaffold from scratch, and I’m moving straight into project setup plus the first-pass simulation engine and UI shell.
assistant
I’m generating the base app with the standard React/TypeScript toolchain so the rest of the work lands on a stable build and test setup instead of hand-rolled scaffolding.
assistant
The scaffold succeeded and Vite is running in a background terminal; I’m reading the generated entry files now so I can replace the starter app with the simulator structure.
assistant
I have the default Vite starter in view now. Next I’m replacing it with the simulator’s data model, calculation pipeline, and the first UI panels in one pass so the app is usable immediately after the first build.
assistant
I’m checking the TypeScript app config before editing so the new modules and tests land with the right compiler assumptions and don’t fight the generated setup.
assistant
I’m writing the core files now: shared types, deterministic timing math, noise injection, solver logic, presets, persistence, and the main UI components that render and explain the simulation.
assistant
The simulation core and component files are in place. I’m now wiring them into the app shell, replacing the Vite starter styles, and adding validation, presets, persistence, and tests so the first build is meaningful.I’m filling in the remaining support files now so the app has validation logic, automated checks for the math, and a deployment config alongside the main UI wiring.
assistant
I’m replacing the generated starter files now with the actual simulator shell and the production-facing styles, plus a couple of robustness fixes in the new components before the first build.
assistant
The app shell is wired. I’m validating the TypeScript and lint state next, then I’ll fix whatever falls out before running tests and a production build.
assistant
I’ve got the updated dependencies installed. The remaining step in this validation pass is to resolve any editor/compiler errors from the new modules before I run the test suite and build.
assistant
I’m running the verification pass now: tests, lint, and a production build, so I can catch both math regressions and deployment issues before stopping.
assistant
The only failing check is the solver convergence flag on perfect data. The estimate is likely landing correctly, so I’m tightening the convergence criterion to treat a near-zero residual as a successful solve instead of requiring only a tiny final step.
assistant
I’ve patched the solver criterion. I’m rerunning the focused verification now to confirm the math passes cleanly and the build still holds.
assistant
The solver is still reporting non-convergence, so I’m probing the exact output next to see whether the estimate is good but the flag is conservative, or whether the iteration path itself needs correction.
assistant
The first debug command got mangled by npm argument parsing. I’m rerunning it with the simpler `npx tsx -e` form so I can inspect the raw solver output.
assistant
The solver issue is structural rather than just the convergence flag. I’m replacing the reference-sensor formulation with a more stable solve over `x`, `y`, and an unknown global time offset, which still handles TDOA-style data but avoids the degenerate first-step case.
assistant
I’ve swapped in the more stable solver. Next is a final compile-and-test pass to confirm the geometry, solver, and build all agree.
assistant
The implementation is functioning, and I’m doing the last two polish items: document how to run and deploy it, then rerun lint as the final gate.
assistant
The README patch missed because the scaffold replaced the original content. I’m reading the file and applying the documentation update against the current version instead of assuming the placeholder is still there.
assistant
I’ve got the generated README content. I’m replacing it with project-specific documentation so the repo matches the app that now exists.
assistant
The code is already passing tests and builds; I’m running the last lint pass now and then I’ll close out with what’s implemented and what’s ready for the next slice.
assistant
Implementation is complete for the first slice: the simulator, configuration UI, persistence, tests, and Netlify build config are all in place and verified.
assistant
I’m recording the verified repo facts once so future work can build on the actual stack, commands, and deployment setup instead of rediscovering them.
assistant
I’m opening the running dev server in the integrated browser so the current implementation is immediately inspectable without another setup step.
assistant
Implemented the first working slice of the bullet impact simulator: React/Vite app scaffold, target click simulation, sensor/noise configuration, browser-side solver, persisted presets, tests, lint-clean state, and Netlify-ready build setup.
assistant
Implemented the first working MVP. The app now lets you click a target to simulate the true hit point, computes ideal and noisy arrival times for configurable sensors behind the target, reconstructs the impact point in the browser, and shows the calculation outputs in side panels. The main integration lives in [src/App.tsx](src/App.tsx), with the solver pipeline split across [src/lib/geometry.ts](src/lib/geometry.ts), [src/lib/noise.ts](src/lib/noise.ts), and [src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts](src/lib/solver/tdoa.ts). The UI is broken out into [src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx](src/components/TargetCanvas.tsx), [src/components/SensorPanel.tsx](src/components/SensorPanel.tsx), [src/components/DiagnosticsPanel.tsx](src/components/DiagnosticsPanel.tsx), and [src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx](src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx).

I also added local persistence and presets in [src/lib/storage.ts](src/lib/storage.ts) and [src/lib/presets.ts](src/lib/presets.ts), Netlify config in [netlify.toml](netlify.toml), tests in [src/lib/__tests__/geometry.test.ts](src/lib/__tests__/geometry.test.ts) and [src/lib/__tests__/solver.test.ts](src/lib/__tests__/solver.test.ts), and updated the project docs in [README.md](README.md). Verification is clean: `npm test`, `npm run lint`, and `npm run build` all pass. The dev server is already running locally at `http://localhost:5173`.

Natural next steps are:
1. Add a visual comparison mode between 3-sensor and 4-sensor solutions.
2. Expose more of the solver math graphically, such as hyperbola or residual overlays.
3. Define the input contract for future real sensor ingestion so the simulator and hardware path share the same solver entry point.

**Planning overlay changes**

I need to make some changes, likely by adding overlay data to the SolverResult types and computing contours or residual circles. I should implement this graphically in the TargetCanvas and consider mentioning an overlay in the diagnostics panel. Since the user asked directly, I probably won’t ask questions. My plan is to keep it simple, using apply_patch for edits and create_file for new files. I'll introduce a SolverOverlay type to compute hyperbola samples.

{
  "kind": "thinking",

}

**Designing heatmap overlays**

I’m thinking of creating a residual heatmap per cell based on RMS residuals, possibly overlaying it with colored contour bands. A simplified approach could include drawing hyperbola overlay paths for each sensor relative to the earliest sensor, using marching squares over the target bounds. For residual rings around the estimated point, I could generate a low-resolution heatmap using rectangles with variable opacity. I’ll put the overlays in a separate file and add toggles in the TargetCanvas for easier user interaction.

}

**Planning overlay implementation**

I’m considering using React's `useState` for toggling overlays locally in the App. I might extend the SolverResult to incorporate overlay data, computing it independently using measurements and solver results. It looks like I can create a new file, `lib/overlay.ts`, with functions like `buildHyperbolaOverlays` and `buildResidualOverlay`. This way, I can avoid modifying SolverResult while still fulfilling the user's request for graphical solver math. I'll ensure not to overcomplicate things by keeping the design straightforward.

I’ve identified the clean insertion point: the target SVG already owns the coordinate transform, so I’m adding math overlays there and generating the hyperbola/residual geometry in a separate library layer rather than bloating the solver itself.

**Planning file creation**

I'm considering creating a new file for overlay types in the simulation. I'll call it overlay.ts and possibly add types in simulation.ts. It's important to craft these carefully. Maybe I'll include optional tests for overlay utilities. I'll check for any import issues and add entries for getActiveMeasurement. I also need to update simulation types, as well as related files like App.tsx and TargetCanvas.tsx. If there's time, I'll add tests for the overlay utilities. Let's get started!

        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 45,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 45,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        colorIndex: index,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 46,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 46,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 47,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 47,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 48,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 48,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    .filter((curve): curve is SolverOverlayCurve => curve !== null)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 49,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 49,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 50,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 50,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const residualHeatmap = input.estimatedImpact",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 51,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 51,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    ? buildResidualHeatmap({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 52,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 52,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        target: input.target,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 53,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 53,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        sensorEntries,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 54,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 54,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        estimatedImpact: input.estimatedImpact,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 55,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 55,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        speedOfSound: input.speedOfSound,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 56,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 56,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 57,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 57,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    : []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 58,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 58,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 59,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 59,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 60,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 60,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    hyperbolaCurves,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 61,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 61,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    residualHeatmap,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 62,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 62,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 63,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 63,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 64,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 64,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 65,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 65,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction buildHyperbolaCurve(input: {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 66,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 66,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 67,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 67,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  reference: SensorEntry",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 68,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 68,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  comparison: SensorEntry",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 69,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 69,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 70,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 70,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  colorIndex: number",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 71,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 71,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}): SolverOverlayCurve | null {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 72,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 72,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const deltaDistance =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 73,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 73,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    (input.comparison.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 74,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 74,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      input.reference.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds) *",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 75,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 75,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.speedOfSound",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 76,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 76,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const yValues = Array.from({ length: CONTOUR_STEPS + 1 }, (_, index) =>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 77,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 77,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    -input.target.height / 2 + (input.target.height * index) / CONTOUR_STEPS,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 78,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 78,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 79,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 79,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const pointRows: Coordinate[][] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 80,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 80,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 81,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 81,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const y of yValues) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 82,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 82,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const row = sampleRow(input.target, y, (x) =>",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 83,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 83,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      evaluateHyperbola(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 84,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 84,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        { x, y },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 85,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 85,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        input.reference.sensor,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 86,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 86,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        input.comparison.sensor,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 87,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 87,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        deltaDistance,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 88,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 88,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      ),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 89,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 89,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 90,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 90,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 91,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 91,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (row.length > 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 92,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 92,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      pointRows.push(row)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 93,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 93,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 94,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 94,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 95,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 95,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 96,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const branches = splitCurveBranches(pointRows)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 97,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 97,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (branches.length === 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 98,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 98,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    return null",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 99,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 99,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 100,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 100,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 101,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 101,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 102,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 102,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    id: `${input.reference.sensor.id}-${input.comparison.sensor.id}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 103,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 103,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    label: `${input.comparison.sensor.label} vs ${input.reference.sensor.label}`,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 104,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 104,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    colorToken: getCurveColor(input.colorIndex),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 105,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 105,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    branches,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 106,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 106,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 107,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 107,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 108,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 108,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 109,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 109,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction buildResidualHeatmap(input: {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 110,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 110,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 111,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 111,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensorEntries: SensorEntry[]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 112,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 112,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 113,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 113,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 114,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 114,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}): SolverOverlayHeatCell[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 115,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 115,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const estimatedOffset = getEstimatedOffset(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 116,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 116,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.estimatedImpact,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 117,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 117,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.sensorEntries,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 118,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 118,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    input.speedOfSound,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 119,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 119,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 120,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 120,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const cells: SolverOverlayHeatCell[] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 121,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 121,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let maxResidual = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 122,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 122,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 123,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 123,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (let row = 0; row < GRID_SIZE; row += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 124,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 124,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    for (let column = 0; column < GRID_SIZE; column += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 125,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 125,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const x =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 126,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 126,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        -input.target.width / 2 +",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 127,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 127,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        ((column + 0.5) * input.target.width) / GRID_SIZE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 128,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 128,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const y =",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 129,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 129,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        input.target.height / 2 -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 130,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 130,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        ((row + 0.5) * input.target.height) / GRID_SIZE",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 131,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 131,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const residualMicros = computeResidualMicros(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 132,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 132,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        { x, y },",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 133,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 133,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        input.sensorEntries,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 134,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 134,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        estimatedOffset,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 135,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 135,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        input.speedOfSound,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 136,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 136,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 137,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 137,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      maxResidual = Math.max(maxResidual, residualMicros)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 138,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 138,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      cells.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 139,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 139,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        x,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 140,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 140,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        y,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 141,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 141,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        width: input.target.width / GRID_SIZE,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 142,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 142,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        height: input.target.height / GRID_SIZE,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 143,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 143,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        residualMicros,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 144,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 144,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        normalized: 0,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 145,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 145,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 146,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 146,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 147,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 147,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 148,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 148,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 149,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 149,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const denominator = Math.max(maxResidual, 1)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 150,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 150,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 151,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 151,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return cells.map((cell) => ({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 152,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 152,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    ...cell,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 153,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 153,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    normalized: Math.min(cell.residualMicros / denominator, 1),",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 154,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 154,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }))",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 155,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 155,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 156,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 156,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 157,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 157,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction evaluateHyperbola(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 158,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 158,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  point: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 159,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 159,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  reference: SensorConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 160,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 160,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  comparison: SensorConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 161,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 161,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  deltaDistance: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 162,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 162,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 163,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 163,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return (",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 164,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 164,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    computeDistance(point, comparison) -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 165,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 165,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    computeDistance(point, reference) -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 166,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 166,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    deltaDistance",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 167,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 167,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  )",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 168,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 168,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 169,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 169,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 170,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 170,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction sampleRow(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 171,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 171,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  target: TargetConfig,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 172,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 172,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  y: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 173,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 173,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  evaluator: (x: number) => number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 174,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 174,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): Coordinate[] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 175,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 175,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const row: Coordinate[] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 176,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 176,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const step = target.width / CONTOUR_STEPS",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 177,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 177,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let previousX = -target.width / 2",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 178,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 178,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let previousValue = evaluator(previousX)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 179,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 179,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 180,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 180,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  if (Math.abs(previousValue) < EPSILON) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 181,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 181,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    row.push({ x: previousX, y })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 182,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 182,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 183,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 183,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 184,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 184,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (let index = 1; index <= CONTOUR_STEPS; index += 1) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 185,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 185,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const currentX = -target.width / 2 + step * index",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 186,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 186,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const currentValue = evaluator(currentX)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 187,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 187,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 188,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 188,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (Math.abs(currentValue) < EPSILON) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 189,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 189,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      row.push({ x: currentX, y })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 190,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 190,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 191,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 191,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 192,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 192,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    if (previousValue === 0 || currentValue === 0 || previousValue * currentValue < 0) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 193,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 193,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const ratio = previousValue / (previousValue - currentValue)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 194,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 194,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      row.push({",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 195,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 195,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        x: previousX + (currentX - previousX) * ratio,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 196,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 196,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        y,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 197,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 197,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 198,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 198,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 199,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 199,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 200,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 200,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    previousX = currentX",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 201,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 201,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    previousValue = currentValue",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 202,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 202,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 203,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 203,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 204,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 204,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return row.sort((left, right) => left.x - right.x)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 205,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 205,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 206,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 206,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 207,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 207,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction splitCurveBranches(pointRows: Coordinate[][]): Coordinate[][] {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 208,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 208,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  const branches: Coordinate[][] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 209,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 209,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 210,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 210,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const row of pointRows) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 211,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 211,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    row.forEach((point, index) => {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 212,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 212,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      if (!branches[index]) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 213,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 213,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        branches[index] = []",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 214,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 214,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 215,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 215,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 216,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 216,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const branch = branches[index]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 217,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 217,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      const previousPoint = branch[branch.length - 1]",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 218,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 218,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      if (!previousPoint || Math.abs(previousPoint.x - point.x) < 12) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 219,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 219,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n        branch.push(point)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 220,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 220,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 221,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 221,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    })",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 222,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 222,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 223,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 223,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 224,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 224,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return branches.filter((branch) => branch.length > 1)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 225,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 225,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 226,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 226,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 227,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 227,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction getEstimatedOffset(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 228,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 228,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 229,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 229,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensorEntries: SensorEntry[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 230,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 230,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 231,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 231,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 232,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 232,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let sum = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 233,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 233,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 234,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 234,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const entry of sensorEntries) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 235,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 235,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    sum +=",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 236,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 236,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      entry.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds -",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 237,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 237,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n      computeDistance(estimatedImpact, entry.sensor) / speedOfSound",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 238,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 238,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 239,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 239,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 240,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 240,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return sum / sensorEntries.length",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 241,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 241,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 242,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 242,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 243,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 243,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction computeResidualMicros(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 244,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 244,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  point: Coordinate,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 245,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 245,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  sensorEntries: SensorEntry[],",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 246,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 246,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  timeOffset: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 247,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 247,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  speedOfSound: number,",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 248,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 248,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n): number {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 249,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 249,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  let sum = 0",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 250,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 250,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 251,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 251,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  for (const entry of sensorEntries) {",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 252,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 252,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const predicted = computeDistance(point, entry.sensor) / speedOfSound + timeOffset",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 253,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 253,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    const residualMicros = (predicted - entry.measurement.noisyTimeSeconds) * 1_000_000",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 254,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 254,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n    sum += residualMicros * residualMicros",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 255,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 255,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  }",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 256,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 256,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 257,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 257,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n  return Math.sqrt(sum / sensorEntries.length)",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 258,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 258,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n}",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 259,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 259,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 260,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 260,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": "\nfunction getSensorEntries(",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 261,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 261,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

        "range": {

          "endLineNumber": 262,
          "endColumn": 1
        }

    ],
    [

        }
      }
    ],
    [
      {

          "endColumn": 1
        }

    [

        "range": {

      {

**Patching overlay diagnostics**

I think I need to focus on the patch for the overlay diagnostics within types/App/TargetCanvas/CSS. I might also consider including tests for the overlay utilities, but I'm thinking that could be optional for now. It feels like the right approach, so I’ll move forward with this patch to improve things. Let's see how it goes!

{
```
  "kind": "textEditGroup",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/types/simulation.ts",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/types/simulation.ts",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/types/simulation.ts",
    "scheme": "file"
  },
  "edits": [
    [
      {
        "text": "export type Coordinate = {\n  x: number\n  y: number\n}\n\nexport type TargetConfig = {\n  width: number\n  height: number\n  label: string\n  units: string\n}\n\nexport type SensorConfig = {\n  id: string\n  label: string\n  x: number\n  y: number\n  depth: number\n  biasMicros: number\n  enabled: boolean\n}\n\nexport type NoiseProfile = {\n  enabled: boolean\n  timingJitterMicros: number\n  clockDriftMicros: number\n  speedVariationPercent: number\n  temperatureCelsius: number\n}\n\nexport type SensorMeasurement = {\n  sensorId: string\n  label: string\n  distance: number\n  idealTimeSeconds: number\n  noisyTimeSeconds: number\n  deltaMicros: number\n}\n\nexport type TraceEntry = {\n  label: string\n  value: string\n}\n\nexport type SolverOverlayCurve = {\n  id: string\n  label: string\n  colorToken: string\n  branches: Coordinate[][]\n}\n\nexport type SolverOverlayHeatCell = {\n  x: number\n  y: number\n  width: number\n  height: number\n  residualMicros: number\n  normalized: number\n}\n\nexport type SolverOverlayBundle = {\n  hyperbolaCurves: SolverOverlayCurve[]\n  residualHeatmap: SolverOverlayHeatCell[]\n}\n\nexport type SolverConfidence = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low'\n\nexport type SolverResult = {\n  estimatedImpact: Coordinate | null\n  converged: boolean\n  iterations: number\n  residualMicros: number\n  confidence: SolverConfidence\n  trace: TraceEntry[]\n}\n\nexport type SimulationState = {\n  target: TargetConfig\n  sensors: SensorConfig[]\n  noise: NoiseProfile\n  impact: Coordinate\n}\n\nexport type OverlayVisibility = {\n  showHyperbolas: boolean\n  showResidualHeatmap: boolean\n}\n\nexport type Preset = {\n  id: string\n  name: string\n  description: string\n  state: SimulationState\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "startLineNumber": 1,
          "startColumn": 1,
          "endLineNumber": 96,
          "endColumn": 1
        }
      }
    ],
    []
  ],
  "done": true,
  "state": {
    "sha1": "644336dfbef122e6b2d3ea8f4a33fab9cc7cc70d",
    "applied": 0
  }
}
```

```
{
  "id": "60a7cb97-a326-4c89-88ee-83da9da3c4a3",

{
  "kind": "codeblockUri",
  "uri": {
    "$mid": 1,
    "fsPath": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "external": "file:///Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
    "path": "/Users/pisan/bitbucket/pisanuw/bullet/src/App.tsx",
```
